FIT-INBOUND-01.overview: An 11-day wildlife adventure through India’s premier national parks, featuring tiger safaris, jungle treks, and cultural highlights in Delhi and Mumbai. Explore dense forests, spot rare wildlife, and experience the thrill of India’s Big Five in protected reserves.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi
days.description: Arrive in Delhi and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening at leisure, exploring nearby markets or relaxing after your journey.

days.title: Delhi sightseeing
days.description: Visit the historic Red Fort, Jama Masjid, and Humayun’s Tomb. In the afternoon, explore Chandni Chowk for local cuisine and shopping.

days.title: Fly to Jabalpur – Bandhavgarh
days.description: Fly to Jabalpur and drive to Bandhavgarh National Park. Enjoy a late afternoon safari to spot tigers and other wildlife in the park.

days.title: Bandhavgarh jungle safaris
days.description: Embark on two morning and evening safaris in Bandhavgarh, known for its high tiger density. Visit the ancient Bandhavgarh Fort for panoramic views.

days.title: Bandhavgarh to Kanha
days.description: Drive to Kanha National Park, stopping at the scenic Bamarha meadows. Enjoy a short safari upon arrival to acclimate to the park.

days.title: Kanha jungle safaris
days.description: Spend the day on jeep safaris in Kanha, famous for its barasingha (swamp deer) and tiger sightings. Visit the Kanha Museum to learn about the park’s ecology.

days.title: Kanha to Pench
days.description: Travel to Pench National Park, stopping at the historic Sitabuldi Fort in Nagpur. Enjoy a relaxed evening at the lodge.

days.title: Pench jungle safaris
days.description: Explore Pench’s dense forests on safaris, known for its leopards and wild dogs. Visit the Pench River, a key water source for wildlife.

days.title: Pench to Tadoba
days.description: Drive to Tadoba Andhari Tiger Reserve, stopping at Chandrapur for lunch. Enjoy a night safari to spot nocturnal wildlife.

days.title: Tadoba jungle safaris
days.description: Spend the day on safaris in Tadoba, one of India’s best tiger reserves. Visit the Tadoba Lake for birdwatching and scenic views.

days.title: Departure from Mumbai
days.description: Drive to Nagpur for your flight to Mumbai. Spend your last evening exploring Marine Drive or local markets before departure.

FIT-INBOUND-02.overview: Explore the ancient rock-cut caves of Maharashtra, showcasing stunning Buddhist, Hindu, and Jain architecture. This 6-day tour covers Nashik's historic sites and the UNESCO-listed Ajanta and Ellora caves near Aurangabad.

days.title: Arrival in Nashik
days.description: Arrive in Nashik, a historic city known for its vineyards and religious significance. Check into your hotel and relax before exploring the local markets and temples.

days.title: Nashik – Panchavati & Sula Vineyards
days.description: Visit Panchavati, a sacred area with temples like Kalaram and Muktidham. Later, tour Sula Vineyards for wine tasting and vineyard insights.

days.title: Nashik to Aurangabad – Travel Day
days.description: Travel to Aurangabad, a city steeped in Mughal history. En route, stop at Daulatabad Fort for panoramic views and medieval architecture.

days.title: Ajanta Caves – UNESCO Marvel
days.description: Explore the 2nd-century Ajanta Caves, featuring intricate Buddhist murals and carvings. Spend the day admiring the rock-cut chaityas and viharas.

days.title: Ellora Caves – Kailash Temple
days.description: Discover the Ellora Caves, a UNESCO site with 34 caves spanning Hindu, Buddhist, and Jain traditions. Marvel at the monolithic Kailash Temple, a masterpiece of ancient engineering.

days.title: Departure from Aurangabad
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Aurangabad airport or railway station for departure. Reflect on the journey through Maharashtra's cave heritage.

FIT-INBOUND-03.overview: This 7-day tribal tour of eastern India explores the rich cultural heritage and indigenous traditions of Odisha’s tribal communities. The journey covers sacred sites, tribal villages, and scenic landscapes from Bhubaneshwar to remote regions near the Andhra Pradesh border.

days.title: Arrival in Bhubaneshwar
days.description: Arrive at Bhubaneshwar airport or railway station and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening exploring the ancient Lingaraj Temple, a 7th-century Shiva shrine, and enjoy Odia cuisine at a local restaurant.

days.title: Bhubaneshwar city tour
days.description: Visit the Dhauli Shanti Stupa, a Buddhist monument marking the site of Ashoka’s conversion after the Kalinga War. Explore the Odisha State Museum to learn about tribal artifacts and regional history.

days.title: Bhubaneshwar to Gopalpur
days.description: Travel to Gopalpur-on-Sea, a serene coastal town, and relax on its golden beaches. Visit the nearby Taratarini Temple, a Shakti Peetha perched on a hill overlooking the Rushikulya River.

days.title: Gopalpur to Raygada
days.description: Drive to Raygada, a gateway to Odisha’s tribal heartland, and visit the tribal market to observe daily life and crafts. Meet local Dongria Kondh or Saura tribes to learn about their unique traditions and sustainable farming.

days.title: Raygada tribal village visit
days.description: Spend the day in a remote tribal village near Raygada, participating in cultural exchanges and observing traditional dance performances. Learn about indigenous medicinal plants from local healers.

days.title: Raygada to Jeypore
days.description: Travel to Jeypore, a historic town surrounded by lush forests, and visit the Jeypore Palace. Explore the weekly tribal market to purchase handmade crafts like Dokra metalwork and Saura paintings.

days.title: Departure from Jeypore
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Jeypore airport or railway station for your onward journey. Reflect on the tribal experiences and cultural insights gained during the tour.

FIT-INBOUND-04.overview: Experience the rejuvenating blend of Ayurveda and Kerala’s serene backwaters on this 8-day wellness retreat. The tour begins in Kochi with cultural immersion and transitions through lush landscapes to a tranquil Ayurvedic resort for holistic healing.

days.title: Arrival in Kochi – Welcome to Kerala
days.description: Arrive at Kochi International Airport and transfer to your heritage hotel in Fort Kochi. Enjoy a traditional Kerala welcome drink and light refreshments while settling into your room.

days.title: Kochi – Cultural Exploration
days.description: Visit the iconic Fort Kochi, explore the Chinese fishing nets, and stroll through the historic Jew Town. Attend a Kathakali dance performance in the evening for a cultural immersion.

days.title: Kochi to Kumarakom – Backwaters Cruise
days.description: Travel to Kumarakom and embark on a serene houseboat cruise along the Vembanad Lake. Enjoy freshly prepared Kerala cuisine onboard as you glide past coconut groves and waterways.

days.title: Kumarakom – Ayurvedic Consultation
days.description: Begin your Ayurvedic wellness program with a personalized consultation and dosha assessment. Relax with a traditional Abhyanga massage followed by herbal steam therapy.

days.title: Kumarakom – Yoga & Meditation
days.description: Join a guided yoga session at sunrise overlooking the backwaters. Participate in a meditation workshop and enjoy a light Ayurvedic lunch prepared with local ingredients.

days.title: Kumarakom – Nature Walk & Therapies
days.description: Take a guided nature walk through the village to observe local farming practices. Continue with Ayurvedic therapies including Pizhichil or Njavarakizhi for deep relaxation.

days.title: Kumarakom – Wellness & Leisure
days.description: Spend the day at leisure with optional activities like Ayurvedic cooking classes or a village cycling tour. Unwind with a sunset Ayurvedic therapy session before dinner.

days.title: Departure from Kochi
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Kochi Airport for your onward journey. Relish the memories of your wellness retreat as you depart with a sense of rejuvenation.

FIT-INBOUND-06.overview: This 8-day tour explores the cultural and natural highlights of Nepal, starting in Kathmandu with its historic temples, then venturing into the wildlife-rich Chitwan National Park, and ending with the scenic beauty of Pokhara and its lakes. The journey blends heritage, adventure, and relaxation in one of the world's most diverse countries.

days.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
days.description: Arrive at Tribhuvan International Airport and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening exploring nearby Thamel, a vibrant hub for shopping and dining, to acclimate to the city's rhythm.

days.title: Kathmandu Sightseeing Tour
days.description: Visit the UNESCO-listed Durbar Square, Swayambhunath Stupa (Monkey Temple), and Pashupatinath Temple. Experience the blend of Newari architecture and spiritual traditions in the heart of the city.

days.title: Fly to Chitwan National Park
days.description: Take a short flight to Bharatpur and drive to Chitwan National Park. Enjoy a welcome drink and orientation before a gentle jungle walk to spot local birds and wildlife.

days.title: Chitwan Jungle Safari
days.description: Embark on an early morning jeep safari to spot one-horned rhinos, elephants, and crocodiles. In the afternoon, visit a Tharu village to learn about indigenous culture and traditions.

days.title: Chitwan to Pokhara Flight
days.description: Fly from Chitwan to Pokhara, a scenic gateway to the Annapurna range. Relax by Phewa Lake and enjoy views of the Himalayas from your hotel balcony.

days.title: Pokhara Lakeside Exploration
days.description: Visit Davis Falls and the World Peace Pagoda for panoramic lake and mountain views. Take a boat ride on Phewa Lake and explore the colorful markets of Lakeside.

days.title: Pokhara Adventure Day
days.description: Choose between paragliding, zip-lining, or a short trek to Sarangkot for sunrise views over the Annapurna range. Alternatively, visit the International Mountain Museum.

days.title: Departure from Kathmandu
days.description: Transfer to the airport for your onward journey. If time permits, pick up last-minute souvenirs from Thamel before heading home.

FIT-INBOUND-11.overview: Experience the best of Nepal with this luxury 8-day tour, blending cultural heritage, wildlife adventures, and breathtaking Himalayan views. From the historic streets of Kathmandu to the serene jungles of Chitwan and the scenic beauty of Pokhara, this itinerary offers a perfect mix of relaxation and exploration.

days.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
days.description: Arrive at Tribhuvan International Airport and transfer to your luxury hotel in Thamel. Relax and acclimatize to the altitude while enjoying a welcome dinner featuring traditional Nepali cuisine.

days.title: Kathmandu Sightseeing Tour
days.description: Visit UNESCO World Heritage Sites including Swayambhunath Stupa and Pashupatinath Temple. Explore the historic Durbar Square and enjoy a cultural evening with a traditional dance performance.

days.title: Fly to Chitwan – Jungle Safari
days.description: Take a short flight to Bharatpur and transfer to a luxury jungle resort in Chitwan. Embark on a jeep safari to spot one-horned rhinos, elephants, and exotic birds in Chitwan National Park.

days.title: Chitwan Wildlife Adventures
days.description: Enjoy a canoe ride on the Rapti River and visit a Tharu village to learn about local culture. Participate in a bird-watching tour and relax with a spa treatment at the resort.

days.title: Fly to Pokhara – Lakeside Relaxation
days.description: Take a scenic flight to Pokhara and check into a lakeside luxury hotel. Stroll along Phewa Lake and enjoy stunning views of the Annapurna range from your balcony.

days.title: Pokhara Adventure & Exploration
days.description: Go paragliding or take a sunrise hike to Sarangkot for panoramic Himalayan views. Visit the World Peace Pagoda and explore the vibrant Lakeside market for souvenirs.

days.title: Return to Kathmandu
days.description: Fly back to Kathmandu and spend the afternoon shopping for handicrafts and souvenirs. Enjoy a farewell dinner at a rooftop restaurant with live music and city views.

days.title: Departure from Kathmandu
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to the airport for your onward journey. Reflect on your journey as you depart with cherished memories of Nepal’s beauty and culture.

FIT-INBOUND-12.overview: This 7-day Sri Lanka tour explores cultural heritage, scenic landscapes, and coastal relaxation. Starting in Kandy, the cultural heart of the island, the journey moves through tea plantations in Nuwara Eliya before ending with beachside tranquility in Bentota.

days.title: Arrival in Colombo – Transfer to Kandy
days.description: Arrive at Bandaranaike International Airport and transfer to Kandy by private vehicle. Enjoy a scenic drive through lush countryside, arriving in time for dinner and an overnight stay in the hill capital.

days.title: Kandy – Temple of the Tooth
days.description: Visit the sacred Temple of the Tooth, home to Buddha’s relic, and explore the Kandy Lake. In the evening, experience a traditional cultural dance performance at the Kandy Cultural Centre.

days.title: Kandy to Nuwara Eliya – Tea Plantations
days.description: Travel through picturesque hill country to Nuwara Eliya, stopping at a tea plantation for a guided tour and tasting. Visit the picturesque Gregory Lake and stroll through Victoria Park to spot local birdlife.

days.title: Nuwara Eliya – Scenic Highlights
days.description: Explore the colonial charm of Nuwara Eliya with a visit to the post office and a short hike to Little Adam’s Peak. Enjoy a visit to a working tea factory to learn about Sri Lanka’s famous Ceylon tea.

days.title: Nuwara Eliya to Bentota – Train Ride
days.description: Take a scenic train journey from Nanu Oya to Galle, passing tea estates and waterfalls, before transferring to Bentota. Relax at the beachfront resort with a welcome drink and sunset views.

days.title: Bentota – River Safari & Beaches
days.description: Embark on a boat safari along the Bentota River to spot crocodiles, birds, and mangrove ecosystems. Spend the afternoon at a pristine beach or try water sports like jet skiing and kayaking.

days.title: Departure from Bentota
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to the airport for your departure flight. Enjoy a final glimpse of the Indian Ocean as you head home.

FIT-INBOUND-13.overview: Explore the cultural and natural treasures of Madhya Pradesh on this 7-day journey through historic forts, ancient temples, and serene national parks. The tour highlights the architectural brilliance of Gwalior and Khajuraho, the wildlife of Panna, and the scenic beauty of Jabalpur.

days.title: Arrival in Gwalior
days.description: Arrive in Gwalior, a city steeped in history and known for its majestic forts and palaces. Check into your hotel and relax before exploring the local markets for traditional handicrafts.

days.title: Gwalior Fort & Temples
days.description: Visit the iconic Gwalior Fort, a symbol of Rajput and Mughal architecture, and explore its palaces and temples. Later, admire the intricate carvings at the Teli Ka Mandir and Sas Bahu Temples.

days.title: Travel to Khajuraho
days.description: Travel to Khajuraho, famous for its UNESCO-listed group of temples adorned with intricate sculptures. Spend the evening exploring the local markets and savoring regional cuisine.

days.title: Khajuraho Temples Tour
days.description: Tour the Western Group of Temples, including the Kandariya Mahadev and Lakshmana Temples, renowned for their erotic carvings. Attend the evening sound and light show to learn about the temple’s history.

days.title: Panna National Park Safari
days.description: Embark on a thrilling safari in Panna National Park, home to tigers, leopards, and diverse birdlife. Enjoy the scenic beauty of the Ken River and visit Pandava Falls for a refreshing dip.

days.title: Travel to Jabalpur
days.description: Travel to Jabalpur, a city known for its marble rocks and ancient temples. Visit the Marble Rocks at Bhedaghat and enjoy a boat ride on the Narmada River.

days.title: Departure from Jabalpur
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to the airport or railway station for your onward journey. Reflect on the memories of temples, forts, and wildlife from this unforgettable tour.

FIT-INBOUND-14.overview: Discover the pristine beauty and cultural richness of North East India with this 10-day tour covering wildlife, hill stations, living root bridges, and tea gardens. The itinerary blends adventure, nature, and local traditions across Manas, Shillong, Cherrapunjee, and Kaziranga.

days.title: Arrival in Guwahati
days.description: Arrive at Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport in Guwahati. Transfer to your hotel and relax after the journey. Spend the evening exploring the city's markets or visiting the banks of the Brahmaputra River.

days.title: Manas National Park Safari
days.description: Drive to Manas National Park, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Enjoy jeep safaris to spot one-horned rhinos, elephants, and Bengal tigers. Visit the Manas River and learn about the park's conservation efforts.

days.title: Manas to Shillong Drive
days.description: Travel through scenic hills to Shillong, the capital of Meghalaya. Stop at Elephant Falls and Ward's Lake for short breaks. Arrive in Shillong and explore local cafes and the bustling Police Bazaar.

days.title: Shillong Sightseeing Tour
days.description: Visit the Don Bosco Museum to explore Northeast India's cultural heritage. Head to Shillong Peak for panoramic views and visit the Lady Hydari Park. Enjoy a traditional Khasi meal in the evening.

days.title: Drive to Cherrapunjee
days.description: Travel to Cherrapunjee, known for its living root bridges and waterfalls. Stop at Mawphlang Sacred Forest to see ancient Khasi traditions. Arrive in Cherrapunjee and check into your homestay.

days.title: Cherrapunjee Adventure
days.description: Explore the double-decker living root bridge at Nongriat village with a trek through lush forests. Visit the Nohkalikai Falls, India's tallest plunge waterfall. Experience local Khasi hospitality and cuisine.

days.title: Cherrapunjee to Kaziranga
days.description: Drive to Kaziranga National Park, crossing the scenic Karbi Anglong hills. Stop at the Hoollongapar Gibbon Sanctuary to spot India's only ape species. Arrive in Kaziranga and relax in the evening.

days.title: Kaziranga Safari & Tea Visit
days.description: Enjoy an early morning elephant safari in Kaziranga to spot rhinos and other wildlife. Visit a nearby tea estate to learn about Assam's tea cultivation. Relax by the pool or explore the park's trails.

days.title: Kaziranga Nature Walks
days.description: Take a jeep safari in the park's western range to see wild buffaloes and migratory birds. Visit the Kaziranga Orchid Park to admire rare orchid species. Enjoy a cultural performance by local tribes in the evening.

days.title: Departure from Guwahati
days.description: Drive back to Guwahati for your departure flight. Stop at the Kamakhya Temple if time permits. Transfer to the airport and conclude your North East India tour.

FIT-INBOUND-15.overview: Experience the spiritual and cultural essence of Uttar Pradesh with this 6-day tour. Explore ancient cities, witness grand religious ceremonies, and delve into the rich heritage of Varanasi, Prayagraj, Ayodhya, and Lucknow.

days.title: Arrival in Varanasi
days.description: Arrive in Varanasi, the spiritual capital of India. Check into your hotel and relax after your journey. In the evening, take a leisurely stroll along the ghats of the Ganges River.

days.title: Varanasi – Spiritual Exploration
days.description: Visit the sacred Kashi Vishwanath Temple and attend the Ganga Aarti at Dashashwamedh Ghat. Explore the narrow lanes of the old city and witness the vibrant culture of Varanasi.

days.title: Varanasi to Prayagraj – Triveni Sangam
days.description: Travel to Prayagraj and visit the Triveni Sangam, the confluence of the Ganges, Yamuna, and Saraswati rivers. Attend the evening Ganga Aarti at the Sangam and explore the city's historical sites.

days.title: Prayagraj to Ayodhya – Ram Temple
days.description: Travel to Ayodhya and visit the newly constructed Ram Mandir. Explore the ancient temples and ghats along the Sarayu River. Experience the serene atmosphere of this sacred city.

days.title: Ayodhya to Lucknow – Heritage Walk
days.description: Travel to Lucknow and explore the Bara Imambara and Chota Imambara. Enjoy the city's famous Awadhi cuisine and take a heritage walk through the old city's colonial architecture.

days.title: Departure from Lucknow
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to the airport or railway station for your departure. The tour concludes with cherished memories of Uttar Pradesh's cultural and spiritual treasures.

FIT-INBOUND-16.overview: This 8-day tour explores Bhutan's cultural and natural highlights, starting from the southern border town of Phuentsholing and journeying through Thimphu, Punakha, and Paro. Experience Bhutanese monasteries, fortresses, scenic valleys, and traditional architecture while immersing in the country's rich Buddhist heritage.

days.title: Arrival in Phuentsholing
days.description: Arrive at Phuentsholing, Bhutan's southern gateway, and complete immigration formalities. Explore the bustling local markets and visit the Karbandi Monastery for panoramic views of the town and surrounding hills.

days.title: Phuentsholing to Thimphu
days.description: Drive to Thimphu, Bhutan's capital, stopping at the scenic Dochula Pass for views of the Himalayas. Visit the National Memorial Chorten and the Buddha Dordenma statue, symbolizing peace and prosperity.

days.title: Thimphu sightseeing
days.description: Explore Thimphu's cultural landmarks, including the Folk Heritage Museum and the Textile Museum. Visit the Tango Monastery and Cheri Monastery, set in serene forested surroundings.

days.title: Thimphu to Punakha
days.description: Travel to Punakha, stopping at the majestic Dochula Pass and the picturesque Chimi Lhakhang temple. Visit the Punakha Dzong, a stunning riverside fortress surrounded by lush valleys.

days.title: Punakha valley exploration
days.description: Hike to Khamsum Yulley Namgyal Chorten, a beautiful temple perched on a hill. Explore the serene Punakha Valley and enjoy a traditional Bhutanese lunch by the Mo Chhu River.

days.title: Punakha to Paro
days.description: Drive to Paro, passing through scenic landscapes and traditional villages. Visit the Paro Rinpung Dzong, a 17th-century fortress overlooking the Paro Chhu River.

days.title: Paro sightseeing
days.description: Hike to the iconic Tiger's Nest Monastery (Paro Taktsang), a sacred Buddhist site perched on a cliff. Explore Paro's local markets and the National Museum for a deeper cultural experience.

days.title: Departure from Paro
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Paro International Airport for departure. Enjoy a final glimpse of Bhutan's stunning landscapes before concluding your journey.

FIT-INBOUND-17.overview: A 15-day immersive Ayurvedic retreat combining Panchakarma detoxification with mindfulness practices at Dharana, set against the serene hills of Lonavala. This holistic journey blends traditional healing therapies, yoga, and meditation to rejuvenate mind, body, and spirit.

days.title: Arrival in Lonavala
days.description: Arrive at Lonavala railway station or Pune airport and transfer to the retreat center. Check-in, settle into your tranquil accommodation, and enjoy a welcome Ayurvedic tea ceremony to begin your detox journey.

days.title: Orientation & Dosha Assessment
days.description: Participate in an initial consultation with Ayurvedic doctors to determine your dosha (body constitution). Enjoy a light herbal lunch followed by a guided tour of the retreat facilities and evening meditation session.

days.title: Introduction to Panchakarma
days.description: Attend a detailed session on Panchakarma therapies and their benefits. Begin with Abhyanga (oil massage) to prepare the body for deeper detoxification. Relax with a nature walk in the surrounding hills.

days.title: Snehana & Swedana Therapy
days.description: Experience Snehana (oleation therapy) followed by Swedana (herbal steam bath) to loosen toxins. Enjoy a light Ayurvedic diet and participate in a group yoga session to enhance circulation.

days.title: Virechana (Purgation Therapy)
days.description: Undergo Virechana, a controlled purgation process to cleanse the gastrointestinal tract. Spend the afternoon in restorative yoga and a guided breathing workshop to support the detox process.

days.title: Basti (Enema Therapy) Session
days.description: Begin Basti therapy, a specialized Ayurvedic enema treatment for balancing Vata dosha. Relax with a gentle meditation session and enjoy a nourishing herbal soup for dinner.

days.title: Nasya (Nasal Therapy) Day
days.description: Receive Nasya treatment to clear sinus congestion and improve mental clarity. Participate in a mindfulness workshop and enjoy a peaceful evening by the retreat’s waterfall.

days.title: Rest & Rejuvenation
days.description: A lighter therapy day focused on rest and rejuvenation. Enjoy a full-body massage with herbal oils and spend time journaling or reading in the serene garden setting.

days.title: Yoga & Meditation Retreat
days.description: Engage in a full-day yoga and meditation program led by experienced instructors. Practice asanas to improve flexibility and participate in a sunset meditation overlooking the valley.

days.title: Ayurvedic Diet Workshop
days.description: Learn about Ayurvedic nutrition and how to incorporate healing foods into daily meals. Prepare a simple Ayurvedic dish under expert guidance and enjoy a communal lunch.

days.title: Nature Therapy & Forest Bathing
days.description: Participate in a guided forest therapy session in the lush surroundings of Lonavala. Practice grounding exercises and mindful walking to reconnect with nature.

days.title: Final Panchakarma Session
days.description: Complete the final phase of Panchakarma with a personalized therapy session. Reflect on your journey with a one-on-one consultation with the Ayurvedic doctor.

days.title: Silent Reflection Day
days.description: A day dedicated to silent reflection and introspection. Enjoy gentle yoga, meditation, and journaling in a peaceful environment to integrate your healing experience.

days.title: Cultural Exploration in Lonavala
days.description: Visit the scenic Lohagad Fort for a light hike and panoramic views. Explore local markets for Ayurvedic herbs and souvenirs before returning for a farewell dinner.

days.title: Departure from Lonavala
days.description: After a final Ayurvedic breakfast, check out and transfer to Lonavala railway station or Pune airport for your onward journey, carrying the benefits of your rejuvenating retreat.

FIT-INBOUND-7.overview: Experience the diverse flavors and landscapes of Kerala and Tamil Nadu with this 11-day journey through backwaters, spice plantations, wildlife sanctuaries, and colonial heritage. Stay at premium CGH Earth hotels offering authentic local hospitality and cuisine.

days.title: Arrival in Cochin – Welcome to Kerala
days.description: Arrive at Cochin International Airport and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening relaxing and enjoying a traditional Kerala welcome drink and light dinner.

days.title: Cochin – Forts, spices and Kathakali
days.description: Explore Fort Kochi’s colonial landmarks like the Chinese Fishing Nets and Mattancherry Palace. Attend a Kathakali performance in the evening and savor a seafood dinner by the waterfront.

days.title: Cochin to Kumarakom – Backwaters cruise
days.description: Drive to Kumarakom and enjoy a serene houseboat cruise through Vembanad Lake’s tranquil backwaters. Visit Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary to spot migratory birds in the late afternoon.

days.title: Kumarakom – Village life and fishing
days.description: Participate in a traditional fishing net demonstration and visit local coconut farms. Relax with a Kerala-style Ayurvedic massage at the resort before an early dinner.

days.title: Kumarakom to Thekkady – Spice plantation tour
days.description: Travel to Thekkady and tour a lush spice plantation, learning about cardamom, pepper, and vanilla cultivation. Enjoy a guided jungle walk in Periyar National Park in the late afternoon.

days.title: Thekkady – Wildlife and bamboo rafting
days.description: Take a jeep safari into Periyar Tiger Reserve to spot elephants and other wildlife. Later, enjoy a bamboo rafting adventure on the Periyar River followed by a campfire dinner.

days.title: Thekkady to Chettinad – Heritage trail begins
days.description: Drive to Chettinad and visit the ornate Chettinad mansions showcasing 19th-century Tamil Nadu architecture. Enjoy a traditional Chettinad vegetarian lunch at a heritage home.

days.title: Chettinad – Temples and silk weaving
days.description: Explore the grand Athangudi Temple and learn about Chettinad’s famous silk and cotton weaving at a local workshop. Sample authentic Chettinad cuisine for dinner.

days.title: Chettinad to Pondicherry – French Quarter walk
days.description: Travel to Pondicherry and stroll through the charming French Quarter with its colonial villas and bougainvillea-lined streets. Visit the Aurobindo Ashram and enjoy a sunset at the Promenade.

days.title: Pondicherry – Auroville and beaches
days.description: Spend the morning at Auroville, exploring the Matrimandir and visiting craft workshops. Relax on Serenity Beach in the afternoon before a farewell dinner.

days.title: Departure from Pondicherry
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Pondicherry Airport for your onward journey, carrying memories of Kerala’s culture and cuisine.

FIT-INBOUND-8.overview: An immersive 8-day journey through Kerala’s lush landscapes, serene backwaters, and wildlife sanctuaries, featuring stays at premium CGH Earth hotels. Experience spice plantations, houseboat cruises, and cultural encounters in the heart of God’s Own Country.

days.title: Arrival in Cochin – Heritage walk
days.description: Arrive in Cochin and check into your hotel. Enjoy a guided heritage walk through Fort Kochi’s colonial streets, visiting landmarks like the Chinese Fishing Nets, Mattancherry Palace, and St. Francis Church.

days.title: Cochin – Spice plantation tour
days.description: Visit a nearby spice plantation in the Western Ghats to learn about cardamom, pepper, and vanilla cultivation. Return to Cochin for a Kathakali dance performance in the evening.

days.title: Cochin to Thekkady – Wildlife safari
days.description: Travel to Thekkady and check into CGH Earth’s Spice Grove. Embark on a jeep safari in Periyar National Park to spot elephants, tigers, and rare birds amidst dense forests.

days.title: Thekkady – Spice village tour
days.description: Explore a local spice village to see traditional farming techniques and taste fresh spices. Participate in a cooking class to learn Kerala’s signature dishes using organic ingredients.

days.title: Thekkady to Kumarakom – Backwaters cruise
days.description: Travel to Kumarakom and check into CGH Earth’s Kumarakom Lake Resort. Cruise through the Vembanad Lake on a traditional houseboat, enjoying serene views and fresh Keralan cuisine.

days.title: Kumarakom – Birdwatching & fishing
days.description: Wake up to a sunrise birdwatching session along the backwaters. Try your hand at local fishing methods before a relaxing Ayurvedic massage at the resort.

days.title: Kumarakom to Marari – Beach relaxation
days.description: Drive to Marari Beach and check into CGH Earth’s Marari Beach Resort. Spend the day unwinding on the golden sands, swimming in the Arabian Sea, or strolling through coconut groves.

days.title: Marari – Departure
days.description: Enjoy a leisurely breakfast with ocean views before transferring to Cochin for your onward journey. Relish the memories of Kerala’s tranquil beauty as you depart.

INBOUND-01.overview: A 9-day cultural and historical journey through Maharashtra, exploring the vibrant city of Mumbai, the heritage of Pune, the ancient caves of Aurangabad, and the spiritual vineyards of Nashik. This tour blends urban exploration, architectural marvels, and serene landscapes.

days.title: Arrival in Mumbai – Gateway of India
days.description: Arrive in Mumbai and check into your hotel. Visit the iconic Gateway of India and take a short ferry ride to the Elephanta Caves to explore ancient rock-cut temples. Enjoy a welcome dinner at a local seafood restaurant.

days.title: Mumbai – Colonial & Modern
days.description: Explore Mumbai’s colonial heritage with visits to the Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Terminus and the Taj Mahal Palace Hotel. Visit the bustling Crawford Market and the serene Haji Ali Dargah. End the day with a dusk walk at Marine Drive.

days.title: Mumbai to Pune – Shivaji Legacy
days.description: Travel to Pune and visit the grand Shaniwar Wada fort, a symbol of Maratha power. Explore the Aga Khan Palace, a historic landmark associated with Mahatma Gandhi. Enjoy a traditional Maharashtrian lunch in the city.

days.title: Pune – Temples & Education
days.description: Visit the revered Dagadusheth Ganapati Temple and the historic Parvati Hill for panoramic views. Explore the Osho International Meditation Resort and the prestigious Fergusson College. Spend the evening exploring the lively FC Road.

days.title: Pune to Aurangabad – Ajanta Caves
days.description: Travel to Aurangabad and visit the UNESCO-listed Ajanta Caves, known for their ancient Buddhist murals and sculptures. Enjoy a traditional Aurangabad delicacy, like Naan Qalia, for dinner. Relax at your heritage hotel.

days.title: Aurangabad – Ellora & Grishneshwar
days.description: Explore the magnificent Ellora Caves, a UNESCO site featuring rock-cut temples from Hindu, Buddhist, and Jain traditions. Visit the nearby Grishneshwar Jyotirlinga Temple, one of the twelve sacred Shiva temples. Enjoy a cultural dance performance in the evening.

days.title: Aurangabad to Nashik – Wine & Temples
days.description: Travel to Nashik, known as the wine capital of India. Visit the ancient Kalaram Temple and the serene Panchavati ghats. Enjoy a wine tasting session at a local vineyard and a traditional Maharashtrian dinner.

days.title: Nashik – Spiritual & Scenic
days.description: Explore the Trimbakeshwar Jyotirlinga Temple, one of the holiest Shiva temples. Visit the scenic Anjaneri Fort and the peaceful Muktidham Temple. Spend the evening strolling through the lively Nashik market.

days.title: Nashik to Mumbai – Departure
days.description: Travel back to Mumbai for your departure. Depending on your flight time, you may visit the Chhatrapati Shivaji International Airport or enjoy a quick city tour if time permits. Bid farewell to Maharashtra.

INBOUND-010.overview: Experience the cultural and historical richness of South India on this 11-day journey through Tamil Nadu and Kerala. The tour explores ancient temples, coastal heritage, colonial charm, and serene backwaters, offering a blend of spirituality, architecture, and natural beauty.

days.title: Arrival in Chennai
days.description: Arrive in Chennai, the gateway to South India. Check into your hotel and relax after your journey. In the evening, enjoy a cultural performance showcasing traditional Bharatanatyam dance.

days.title: Chennai city tour
days.description: Visit the iconic Marina Beach and the majestic Vivekananda Rock Memorial. Explore the Government Museum and Kapaleeshwarar Temple, a prime example of Dravidian architecture.

days.title: Mahabalipuram exploration
days.description: Discover the UNESCO-listed Shore Temple and the ancient rock-cut caves of Mahabalipuram. Witness the famous Five Rathas and enjoy a traditional coastal lunch by the Bay of Bengal.

days.title: Pondicherry heritage walk
days.description: Stroll through the charming streets of Pondicherry, visiting the Aurobindo Ashram and the iconic French Quarter. Enjoy a sunset at the Promenade and savor French-Indian cuisine.

days.title: Pondicherry to Thanjavur
days.description: Travel to Thanjavur, the cultural capital of the Chola dynasty. Visit the UNESCO-listed Brihadeeswarar Temple, a masterpiece of Dravidian architecture and engineering.

days.title: Thanjavur palace and art
days.description: Explore the Thanjavur Maratha Palace and the Royal Palace Museum. Visit the Saraswathi Mahal Library, housing ancient palm-leaf manuscripts and rare books.

days.title: Thanjavur to Madurai
days.description: Journey to Madurai, the temple city. Visit the Meenakshi Amman Temple, a stunning complex with colorful gopurams and sacred shrines.

days.title: Madurai temple rituals
days.description: Witness the early morning temple rituals at Meenakshi Amman Temple. Explore the Thirumalai Nayakkar Palace and the bustling streets of Madurai's bazaars.

days.title: Madurai to Kerala
days.description: Travel to Kerala, the 'God's Own Country.' Arrive in Alleppey and enjoy a serene houseboat cruise through the tranquil backwaters.

days.title: Kerala backwaters and village
days.description: Experience the beauty of Kerala's backwaters with a village walk and a traditional Kathakali dance performance. Relax and soak in the peaceful surroundings.

days.title: Departure from Kochi
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Kochi for your departure. If time permits, visit Fort Kochi and the Chinese fishing nets before heading to the airport.

INBOUND-011.overview: A 9-day wildlife adventure exploring India's premier national parks and cultural landmarks. Experience thrilling tiger safaris in Kanha and Bandhavgarh, followed by heritage sites in Khajuraho and Agra.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi
days.description: Arrive at Indira Gandhi International Airport and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening exploring nearby markets or relaxing at the hotel.

days.title: Delhi to Kanha – Travel Day
days.description: Morning flight to Jabalpur followed by a scenic drive to Kanha National Park. Check-in at the resort and enjoy a light evening walk in the buffer zone.

days.title: Kanha Safari – Tiger Tracking
days.description: Embark on a thrilling morning safari in Kanha's meadows and sal forests. Afternoon jeep safari offers chances to spot barasingha and other wildlife.

days.title: Kanha to Bandhavgarh – Travel Day
days.description: Drive to Bandhavgarh National Park, known for its high tiger density. Evening jungle walk near Tala gate to spot smaller creatures.

days.title: Bandhavgarh Safari – Royal Wildlife
days.description: Morning and afternoon safaris in Bandhavgarh's diverse zones. Look for tigers, leopards, and sloth bears in the rugged terrain.

days.title: Bandhavgarh to Khajuraho – Travel Day
days.description: Drive to Khajuraho, famous for its UNESCO-listed medieval temples. Evening light and sound show at the Western Group of Temples.

days.title: Khajuraho Temples – Heritage Tour
days.description: Explore the intricate carvings of Kandariya Mahadev and Lakshmana Temples. Visit the Eastern Group of Jain temples in the afternoon.

days.title: Khajuraho to Agra – Travel Day
days.description: Morning drive to Agra with a stop at Fatehpur Sikri. Arrive in Agra and visit the local market for marble souvenirs.

days.title: Departure from Agra
days.description: Early morning visit to the Taj Mahal at sunrise. After breakfast, transfer to the airport for your onward journey.

INBOUND-012.overview: A 15-day wildlife and heritage tour exploring India's iconic national parks and historic cities. Experience royal palaces, tiger safaris, and Mughal monuments while immersing in diverse cultures and landscapes.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi – Welcome to India
days.description: Arrive in Delhi and transfer to your hotel. Enjoy a welcome dinner featuring authentic North Indian cuisine while getting acquainted with the tour itinerary.

days.title: Delhi – Heritage Walk & Old City
days.description: Explore Old Delhi’s bustling streets, visiting Jama Masjid and Chandni Chowk. In New Delhi, admire the India Gate and Humayun’s Tomb, showcasing Mughal architecture.

days.title: Delhi to Jaipur – Pink City Tour
days.description: Travel to Jaipur by road, stopping at Abhaneri stepwell. In Jaipur, visit the Amber Fort and Hawa Mahal, iconic symbols of Rajasthan’s royal past.

days.title: Jaipur – Royal Palaces & Markets
days.description: Discover the City Palace and Jantar Mantar observatory. Spend the evening exploring local markets for handicrafts and textiles.

days.title: Jaipur to Ranthambore – Tiger Safari Prep
days.description: Drive to Ranthambore National Park, known for its Bengal tiger population. Relax at the resort and prepare for the upcoming safaris.

days.title: Ranthambore – Jungle Safari & Fort
days.description: Embark on a morning safari in Ranthambore National Park, spotting tigers and wildlife. Visit Ranthambore Fort, a UNESCO site with panoramic views.

days.title: Ranthambore to Agra – Mughal Marvels
days.description: Travel to Agra, stopping at Fatehpur Sikri, a deserted Mughal city. Arrive in Agra and visit the Agra Fort in the evening.

days.title: Agra – Taj Mahal & Sunrise Views
days.description: Witness the sunrise at the Taj Mahal, followed by a visit to Mehtab Bagh for a serene reflection. Explore the local marble workshops in the afternoon.

days.title: Agra to Bandhavgarh – Tiger Territory
days.description: Fly to Jabalpur and drive to Bandhavgarh National Park. Settle into the lodge and enjoy a relaxed evening.

days.title: Bandhavgarh – Core Zone Safari
days.description: Join a jeep safari in the core zone of Bandhavgarh, renowned for high tiger sightings. Explore the ancient Bandhavgarh Fort and surrounding cliffs.

days.title: Bandhavgarh to Kanha – Sal Forests
days.description: Travel to Kanha National Park, stopping at the scenic Bamarha meadows. Check into the resort and unwind with local cuisine.

days.title: Kanha – Gond Tribal Village & Safari
days.description: Visit a local Gond tribal village to learn about their culture. Enjoy an afternoon safari in Kanha’s lush sal forests.

days.title: Kanha to Mumbai – City of Dreams
days.description: Fly to Mumbai from Jabalpur via Delhi. Arrive in Mumbai and relax at the hotel, exploring Marine Drive in the evening.

days.title: Mumbai – Iconic Sights & Culture
days.description: Visit the Gateway of India and Colaba Causeway. Explore the bustling Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Vastu Sangrahalaya museum.

days.title: Departure from Mumbai
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to the airport for your onward journey. Bid farewell to India with cherished memories of wildlife and heritage.

INBOUND-013.overview: Experience the breathtaking landscapes of Ladakh on this 6-day tour, covering Leh, Nubra Valley, and Pangong Lake. From high-altitude monasteries to sand dunes and serene lakes, this itinerary offers a mix of adventure, culture, and natural beauty.

days.title: Arrival in Leh – Acclimatize
days.description: Arrive in Leh, the capital of Ladakh, situated at 11,500 feet. Spend the day resting and acclimatizing to the high altitude while exploring the local market and Leh Palace.

days.title: Leh to Nubra Valley – Sand dunes & Monastery
days.description: Drive to Nubra Valley via Khardung La, one of the world's highest motorable passes. Visit Diskit Monastery and enjoy the unique white sand dunes of Hunder.

days.title: Nubra Valley – Camel ride & Double-Humped Camels
days.description: Explore the scenic Nubra Valley with a camel safari at Hunder. Visit the ancient Sumur and Panamik villages, known for their hot springs and traditional Ladakhi culture.

days.title: Nubra to Pangong – Chang La Pass & Lake Views
days.description: Drive through Chang La Pass, the third-highest motorable pass in the world, to reach Pangong Lake. Enjoy the stunning turquoise waters and stunning mountain backdrop.

days.title: Pangong Lake – Sunrise & Local Exploration
days.description: Wake up early to witness the sunrise over Pangong Lake, a sight that transforms the waters into a shimmering mirror. Spend the day exploring the lakeside and nearby villages.

days.title: Pangong to Leh – Departure
days.description: Drive back to Leh, stopping at Thiksey Monastery for panoramic views. Afternoon free for last-minute shopping or sightseeing before departure.

INBOUND-014.overview: A 10-day immersive journey through the stunning landscapes of Leh and Ladakh, exploring high-altitude deserts, serene lakes, and ancient monasteries. This tour offers a blend of adventure, culture, and breathtaking natural beauty.

days.title: Arrival in Leh – Acclimatization
days.description: Arrive in Leh, the capital of Ladakh, and spend the day acclimatizing to the high altitude. Explore the local markets and visit the Leh Palace for a glimpse into the region's rich history.

days.title: Leh – Hemis Monastery & Stok Palace
days.description: Visit Hemis Monastery, the largest and wealthiest monastery in Ladakh, known for its vibrant festivals. Later, explore Stok Palace and its museum, showcasing royal artifacts and stunning views of the Stok Range.

days.title: Leh to Nubra Valley – Camel Safari
days.description: Drive to Nubra Valley via Khardung La, one of the world's highest motorable passes. Enjoy a camel safari on the sand dunes of Hunder and visit Diskit Monastery for panoramic views of the valley.

days.title: Nubra Valley – Turtuk & Yarab Tso
days.description: Explore the picturesque village of Turtuk, known for its apricot orchards and Balti culture. Visit Yarab Tso, a hidden lake surrounded by willow trees, and enjoy the serene atmosphere.

days.title: Nubra to Pangong – Chang La Pass
days.description: Drive to Pangong Tso, a stunning high-altitude lake shared with China. Cross Chang La Pass, the third-highest motorable pass in the world, and enjoy the breathtaking views of the lake.

days.title: Pangong – Explore & Stargazing
days.description: Spend the day exploring Pangong Tso, known for its changing hues of blue. In the evening, enjoy stargazing under the clear Ladakhi sky, away from city lights.

days.title: Pangong to Tso Moriri – Korzok Monastery
days.description: Drive to Tso Moriri, a pristine lake nestled in the Changthang Plateau. Visit Korzok Monastery and enjoy the serene surroundings and wildlife, including kiang (Tibetan wild ass).

days.title: Tso Moriri – Local Culture & Nature
days.description: Spend the day exploring the Tso Moriri area, visiting nomadic settlements and learning about their way of life. Enjoy a peaceful walk around the lake and soak in the natural beauty.

days.title: Tso Moriri to Lamayuru – Magnetic Hill
days.description: Drive to Lamayuru, stopping at Magnetic Hill, a gravity-defying phenomenon. Visit Lamayuru Monastery, one of the oldest in Ladakh, and explore the dramatic lunar-like landscape of the valley.

days.title: Lamayuru to Leh – Departure
days.description: Drive back to Leh, stopping at key viewpoints like Sangam (confluence of Indus and Zanskar rivers). After some last-minute shopping or sightseeing, transfer to the airport for departure.

INBOUND-015.overview: A 10-day journey through India's Northeast, exploring wildlife, hill stations, and Himalayan landscapes. Experience Kaziranga's rhinos, Shillong's culture, and Tawang's serene monasteries.

days.title: Arrival in Guwahati
days.description: Arrive at Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening at the Assam State Museum to learn about the region's history and culture.

days.title: Guwahati city tour
days.description: Visit the Umananda Temple on Peacock Island and explore the Kamakhya Temple, a significant pilgrimage site. Later, enjoy a sunset cruise on the Brahmaputra River.

days.title: Guwahati to Kaziranga
days.description: Drive to Kaziranga National Park (4-5 hours) and check into a wildlife resort. Enjoy a jeep safari in the park to spot one-horned rhinos and other wildlife.

days.title: Kaziranga jungle safari
days.description: Embark on an early morning elephant safari followed by a jeep safari to explore Kaziranga's diverse habitats. Visit the Kaziranga Orchid Park to see rare orchid species.

days.title: Kaziranga to Shillong
days.description: Drive to Shillong (5-6 hours) via Guwahati, stopping at the famous Umiam Lake. Explore the bustling local markets and colonial-era architecture in Shillong.

days.title: Shillong city exploration
days.description: Visit the Don Bosco Museum to learn about Northeast India's tribal cultures. Explore the scenic Ward's Lake and the serene Lady Hydari Park.

days.title: Shillong to Tawang
days.description: Fly from Shillong to Tawang (via Guwahati) and drive to your hotel. Visit the Tawang War Memorial to pay respects to fallen soldiers.

days.title: Tawang monastery visit
days.description: Explore the Tawang Monastery, the largest in India, and enjoy panoramic views of the Himalayas. Visit the nearby Nuranang Falls for a scenic hike.

days.title: Tawang to Dirang
days.description: Drive to Dirang (3-4 hours) and visit the Dirang Dzong, a historic fortress. Explore the local apple orchards and enjoy the scenic beauty of the valley.

days.title: Departure from Dirang
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Guwahati Airport for your onward journey. The tour concludes with cherished memories of Northeast India's diverse landscapes.

INBOUND-016.overview: Experience the breathtaking landscapes and vibrant cultures of North East India on this 12-day tour. From the serene Himalayan retreats of Sikkim to the lush tea gardens of Assam, this journey offers a perfect blend of adventure, spirituality, and natural beauty.

days.title: Arrival in Gangtok
days.description: Arrive in Gangtok, the capital of Sikkim, and check into your hotel. Spend the evening exploring local markets and enjoying the scenic views of the Himalayas.

days.title: Gangtok sightseeing
days.description: Visit the Rumtek Monastery, a key center of Tibetan Buddhism, and explore the Enchey Monastery. Enjoy panoramic views of the Kanchenjunga range from the Tashi Viewpoint.

days.title: Gangtok to Lachen
days.description: Drive to Lachen, a picturesque village in North Sikkim, passing through alpine forests and gushing rivers. Stop at the Seven Sisters Waterfalls for a refreshing break.

days.title: Lachen exploration
days.description: Explore the pristine Gurudongmar Lake, one of the highest lakes in the world, and visit the Lachen Monastery. Enjoy the serene beauty of the Himalayas and local village life.

days.title: Lachen to Lachung
days.description: Travel to Lachung, a charming hill station known for its apple orchards and wooden bridges. Visit the Lachung Monastery and enjoy the scenic beauty of the Yumthang Valley.

days.title: Yumthang Valley tour
days.description: Spend the day exploring the Yumthang Valley, also known as the 'Valley of Flowers.' Visit the Shingba Rhododendron Sanctuary and enjoy hot springs at Yumey Samdong.

days.title: Lachung to Pelling
days.description: Drive to Pelling, a scenic town in West Sikkim, with stops at the Khecheopalri Lake and the Pemayangtse Monastery. Enjoy views of the Kanchenjunga range.

days.title: Pelling sightseeing
days.description: Visit the Sangay Waterfalls and the Rabdentse Ruins, offering stunning views of the Himalayas. Explore the local markets and enjoy the serene atmosphere of Pelling.

days.title: Pelling to Shillong
days.description: Fly to Shillong, the capital of Meghalaya, and check into your hotel. Visit the Ward’s Lake and the Shillong Peak for panoramic views of the city.

days.title: Shillong city tour
days.description: Explore the Don Bosco Museum, showcasing the cultural heritage of North East India, and visit the Elephant Falls. Enjoy the colonial charm of Shillong.

days.title: Shillong to Kaziranga
days.description: Drive to Kaziranga National Park, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, known for its one-horned rhinoceroses. Enjoy a jeep safari to spot wildlife in their natural habitat.

days.title: Departure from Kaziranga
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to the airport for your onward journey. Reflect on the unforgettable experiences of North East India.

INBOUND-02.overview: Experience the grandeur of India's royal heritage on this 16-day journey through historic palaces, forts, and cultural landmarks. From the bustling streets of Delhi to the spiritual ghats of Varanasi and the serene temples of Khajuraho, this tour offers a blend of opulence, history, and spirituality.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi
days.description: Arrive in India's capital and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening at leisure, exploring nearby markets or relaxing after your journey.

days.title: Old Delhi heritage walk
days.description: Explore the historic lanes of Old Delhi, visiting the Jama Masjid and Chandni Chowk. Enjoy a traditional Mughlai lunch before visiting the Red Fort.

days.title: New Delhi royal sights
days.description: Visit the grand Rashtrapati Bhavan and Humayun's Tomb. Afternoon at leisure to explore Connaught Place or visit the Qutub Minar.

days.title: Fly to Udaipur – City of Lakes
days.description: Fly to Udaipur and check into your heritage hotel. Visit the City Palace and enjoy a sunset boat ride on Lake Pichola.

days.title: Udaipur royal palaces tour
days.description: Explore the Jagdish Temple and Saheliyon-ki-Bari garden. Evening at leisure to explore local markets or enjoy a cultural performance.

days.title: Travel to Jaipur by road
days.description: Drive to Jaipur, stopping at Abhaneri stepwell en route. Arrive in Jaipur and visit the Amber Fort with an elephant ride.

days.title: Jaipur royal palaces & markets
days.description: Visit the Hawa Mahal and City Palace. Explore Johari Bazaar for traditional Rajasthani souvenirs and crafts.

days.title: Jaipur to Agra – Taj Mahal
days.description: Drive to Agra, visiting Fatehpur Sikri en route. Arrive in Agra and visit the Taj Mahal at sunset.

days.title: Agra Fort & Mughal heritage
days.description: Explore Agra Fort and Mehtab Bagh for a moonlit view of the Taj. Evening at leisure to enjoy local Mughlai cuisine.

days.title: Orchha – Hidden royal gem
days.description: Drive to Orchha, visiting Jhansi Fort en route. Explore the Orchha Fort complex and Ram Raja Temple.

days.title: Khajuraho temples & dance
days.description: Fly to Khajuraho and visit the Western Group of Temples. Evening cultural dance performance at the temple complex.

days.title: Varanasi – Spiritual Ganga
days.description: Fly to Varanasi and visit the Dashashwamedh Ghat for the Ganga Aarti ceremony. Explore the narrow lanes of the old city.

days.title: Varanasi boat ride & silk
days.description: Sunrise boat ride on the Ganges, visiting the ghats and temples. Visit a silk weaving workshop in the afternoon.

days.title: Fly to Kathmandu
days.description: Fly to Kathmandu and check into your hotel. Visit Swayambhunath Stupa and explore Thamel market in the evening.

days.title: Kathmandu heritage tour
days.description: Visit the Durbar Square and Pashupatinath Temple. Enjoy a farewell dinner with Nepali cultural performances.

days.title: Departure from Kathmandu
days.description: Transfer to the airport for your onward journey. End of the tour with cherished memories of Indian and Nepali royalty.

INBOUND-03.overview: This 15-day Heritage Trail tour explores India's rich cultural and architectural legacy, from Mughal and Rajput monuments in Delhi to ancient temples in Khajuraho and medieval ruins in Mandu. The journey blends history, art, and scenic landscapes across key heritage sites.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi – Welcome to India
days.description: Arrive in Delhi and transfer to your hotel. Enjoy a welcome dinner featuring North Indian cuisine, followed by a brief orientation to the tour.

days.title: Old Delhi Exploration
days.description: Visit the Jama Masjid, Chandni Chowk, and the Red Fort. Explore the bustling spice and textile markets before a heritage walk through the walled city.

days.title: New Delhi Landmarks
days.description: Tour the India Gate, Humayun’s Tomb, and Qutub Minar. Experience the contrast between colonial and Mughal architecture in Lutyens' Delhi.

days.title: Travel to Gwalior – Fort & Palaces
days.description: Travel to Gwalior by train or road. Visit the imposing Gwalior Fort and the intricately carved Sas Bahu Temples.

days.title: Gwalior’s Cultural Gems
days.description: Explore the Jai Vilas Palace Museum and the Teli Ka Mandir. Attend a local Sufi music performance in the evening.

days.title: Travel to Khajuraho – Temples of Love
days.description: Travel to Khajuraho by road. Visit the Western Group of Temples, famous for their intricate erotic sculptures.

days.title: Khajuraho Dance Festival
days.description: Explore the Eastern and Southern Group of Temples. In the evening, enjoy a classical dance performance at the Khajuraho Dance Festival (seasonal).

days.title: Travel to Orchha – Riverside Heritage
days.description: Travel to Orchha by road. Visit the Orchha Fort Complex, including Jahangir Mahal and Ram Raja Temple.

days.title: Orchha’s Temples & Palaces
days.description: Explore the Chaturbhuj Temple and the cenotaphs along the Betwa River. Enjoy a sunset boat ride on the river.

days.title: Travel to Bhopal – Lakes & Mosques
days.description: Travel to Bhopal by road. Visit the Upper Lake and the historic Taj-ul-Masajid, one of India’s largest mosques.

days.title: Bhopal’s Museums & Markets
days.description: Tour the State Museum and the Tribal Museum. Explore the local markets for handicrafts and textiles.

days.title: Travel to Mandu – Medieval Ruins
days.description: Travel to Mandu by road. Visit the Jahaz Mahal and Hindola Mahal, showcasing Afghan architecture.

days.title: Mandu’s Palaces & Gardens
days.description: Explore the Rani Rupmati Pavilion and the Baz Bahadur Palace. Enjoy panoramic views from the Darwaza-e-Alamgir.

days.title: Travel to Mumbai – City of Dreams
days.description: Travel to Mumbai by flight. Visit the Gateway of India and Colaba Causeway for a taste of urban India.

days.title: Departure from Mumbai
days.description: Spend the morning at leisure before transferring to the airport for your departure flight.

INBOUND-05.overview: This 13-day Rajasthan tour explores India's royal heritage through majestic forts, palaces, and desert landscapes. Starting in Delhi, the journey traverses historic cities, remote forts, and royal retreats, offering a blend of culture, adventure, and luxury.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi – Heritage Introduction
days.description: Arrive in Delhi and transfer to your hotel. Explore the historic Qutub Minar complex and enjoy a welcome dinner showcasing North Indian cuisine.

days.title: Delhi – Mughal Grandeur
days.description: Visit the Red Fort, Jama Masjid, and Humayun’s Tomb. Experience the vibrant markets of Chandni Chowk before a cultural performance at the Kingdom of Dreams.

days.title: Delhi to Neemrana – Hilltop Fort
days.description: Drive to Neemrana Fort Palace, a stunning 15th-century hilltop fort. Enjoy heritage walks and panoramic views before a relaxing evening at the palace hotel.

days.title: Neemrana to Jaipur – Pink City Arrival
days.description: Travel to Jaipur, the 'Pink City,' and visit the Amber Fort with an elephant ride. Explore the City Palace and Hawa Mahal in the evening.

days.title: Jaipur – Royal Heritage
days.description: Discover Jantar Mantar, a UNESCO-listed astronomical observatory, and the Albert Hall Museum. Enjoy a traditional Rajasthani dinner with folk performances.

days.title: Jaipur to Gajner – Desert Palace
days.description: Drive to Gajner, stopping at Bikaner to visit the Junagarh Fort. Arrive at Gajner Palace, a royal hunting lodge by a tranquil lake.

days.title: Gajner – Wildlife & Relaxation
days.description: Explore the Gajner Wildlife Sanctuary and enjoy a boat ride on the lake. Relax with spa treatments at the palace hotel.

days.title: Gajner to Jaisalmer – Golden Fort
days.description: Travel to Jaisalmer, the 'Golden City,' and explore the 12th-century Jaisalmer Fort. Visit the Patwon Ki Haveli and enjoy a sunset camel ride.

days.title: Jaisalmer – Desert Adventure
days.description: Take a full-day desert safari to Sam Sand Dunes, including camel rides and a cultural program under the stars.

days.title: Jaisalmer to Luni – Sheesh Mahal
days.description: Drive to Luni and visit the stunning Sheesh Mahal Palace. Enjoy a traditional Rajasthani lunch and explore the local village.

days.title: Luni to Rohet – Rural Retreat
days.description: Travel to Rohet and visit the 17th-century Rohetgarh Fort. Experience rural Rajasthan with a village walk and cultural interactions.

days.title: Rohet to Devigarh – Boutique Stay
days.description: Drive to Devigarh and check into a heritage boutique hotel. Relax with spa treatments and enjoy a farewell dinner.

days.title: Departure from Devigarh
days.description: Transfer to the nearest airport for your onward journey, reliving the memories of Rajasthan’s glorious forts.

INBOUND-06.overview: Experience the rich cultural heritage, royal history, and coastal charm of Gujarat on this 14-day tour. From vibrant Ahmedabad to the serene beaches of Diu and the ancient wonders of Bhuj, this itinerary offers a blend of history, wildlife, and local traditions.

days.title: Arrival in Ahmedabad
days.description: Arrive in Ahmedabad, the commercial capital of Gujarat. Check into your hotel and relax after your journey. Spend the evening exploring the local markets or visiting the famous Sidi Saiyyed Mosque.

days.title: Ahmedabad – Heritage Walk
days.description: Join the Heritage Walk, a guided tour through the old city’s pols (traditional neighborhoods). Visit the Jama Masjid, Bhadra Fort, and Gandhi Ashram to learn about Ahmedabad’s history and Gandhi’s legacy.

days.title: Ahmedabad – Sabarmati Ashram
days.description: Visit the Sabarmati Ashram, Gandhi’s former residence, and explore the museum showcasing his life and teachings. Later, visit the Calico Museum of Textiles to admire rare fabric collections.

days.title: Ahmedabad to Bhavnagar
days.description: Travel to Bhavnagar, a historic city known for its shipbuilding industry. Visit the Nilambagh Palace and the Barton Library. Explore the vibrant Gandhi Smarak Bhavan and local markets.

days.title: Bhavnagar – Blackbuck National Park
days.description: Head to the Blackbuck National Park to spot the endangered blackbuck antelope and other wildlife. Enjoy a jeep safari through the grasslands and learn about the region’s biodiversity.

days.title: Bhavnagar to Diu
days.description: Drive to Diu, a charming coastal union territory with Portuguese influences. Visit Diu Fort, Nagoa Beach, and the St. Paul’s Church. Enjoy fresh seafood at the local restaurants.

days.title: Diu – Island Exploration
days.description: Explore Diu’s beaches, including Ghogla Beach and Sunset Point. Visit the Diu Museum and the Nagoa Aquarium. Relax by the sea and enjoy water sports like parasailing.

days.title: Diu to Sasangir
days.description: Travel to Sasangir, home to the Gir National Park, the last abode of the Asiatic lion. Enjoy a jungle safari to spot lions, leopards, and other wildlife in their natural habitat.

days.title: Sasangir – Gir Forest Safari
days.description: Embark on a full-day safari in Gir National Park to see Asiatic lions, deer, and birds. Visit the Devalia Safari Park for a controlled wildlife experience. Learn about conservation efforts in the region.

days.title: Sasangir to Gondal
days.description: Drive to Gondal, a former princely state known for its royal heritage. Visit the Naulakha Palace, the Orchard Palace, and the Swaminarayan Temple. Explore the local markets for handicrafts.

days.title: Gondal – Royal Heritage Tour
days.description: Tour the royal palaces and museums in Gondal, including the Royal Chowk and the Huzoor Palace. Visit the famous Gondal toy museum and enjoy a traditional Gujarati meal at a local restaurant.

days.title: Gondal to Bhuj
days.description: Travel to Bhuj, a historic city in Kutch. Visit the Aina Mahal, Prag Mahal, and the Swaminarayan Temple. Explore the local handicrafts and the vibrant Bhujodi village known for its weaving.

days.title: Bhuj – Rann of Kutch
days.description: Visit the Great Rann of Kutch, a vast salt marsh known for its surreal landscape. Explore the seasonal white desert and enjoy cultural performances at the Rann Utsav if visiting during the festival season.

days.title: Departure from Ahmedabad
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Ahmedabad for your departure. Spend any remaining time shopping for souvenirs or visiting local attractions before heading to the airport.

INBOUND-07.overview: Embark on a royal journey through India's golden triangle and beyond, exploring the regal heritage of Rajasthan. This 14-day tour showcases palaces, forts, and desert landscapes, blending history, culture, and adventure.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi – Welcome to India
days.description: Arrive in the capital city and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening at leisure, soaking in the vibrant atmosphere of Delhi.

days.title: Delhi – Historic Landmarks Tour
days.description: Visit the Red Fort, Jama Masjid, and Chandni Chowk in Old Delhi. In the afternoon, explore Humayun’s Tomb and Qutub Minar in New Delhi.

days.title: Delhi to Mandawa – Shekhawati Havelis
days.description: Drive to Mandawa, a charming town in Shekhawati. Explore the ornate havelis like Mandawa Haveli and Murmuria Haveli, showcasing frescoes and Rajasthani art.

days.title: Mandawa to Bikaner – Camel Country
days.description: Travel to Bikaner, known for its rich history and camel culture. Visit Junagarh Fort and explore the old city’s bustling markets.

days.title: Bikaner – Jain Temples & Sweets
days.description: Discover the intricate architecture of Bhandasar Jain Temple and Laxmi Niwas Palace. Sample Bikaner’s famous sweets like bhujia and rasgullas.

days.title: Bikaner to Jaisalmer – Golden Desert
days.description: Drive to Jaisalmer, the golden city of the Thar Desert. Visit the Jaisalmer Fort and enjoy a sunset camel ride in the dunes.

days.title: Jaisalmer – Desert Safari Adventure
days.description: Explore the Sam Sand Dunes and enjoy a cultural program with folk dances. Spend the night in a desert camp under the stars.

days.title: Jaisalmer to Jodhpur – Blue City Views
days.description: Travel to Jodhpur, the Blue City. Visit Mehrangarh Fort and explore the vibrant streets of the old city.

days.title: Jodhpur – Heritage & Culture
days.description: Discover Jaswant Thada and Umaid Bhawan Palace. Stroll through the bustling Sardar Market for local crafts and textiles.

days.title: Jodhpur to Udaipur – Lakes & Palaces
days.description: Drive to Udaipur, the City of Lakes. Visit City Palace and enjoy a boat ride on Lake Pichola.

days.title: Udaipur – Royal Heritage Walk
days.description: Explore Jagdish Temple, Bagore Ki Haveli, and Saheliyon-ki-Bari. Experience a traditional Rajasthani dinner with cultural performances.

days.title: Udaipur to Jaipur – Pink City Arrival
days.description: Travel to Jaipur, the Pink City. Visit Amber Fort and enjoy a shopping spree at Johari Bazaar.

days.title: Jaipur – Royal Sightseeing Tour
days.description: Explore Hawa Mahal, City Palace, and Jantar Mantar. Enjoy a farewell dinner with Rajasthani folk music and dance.

days.title: Departure from Jaipur
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Jaipur Airport for your onward journey. Bid farewell to the royal lands of Rajasthan.

Inbound-09.overview: Experience the tranquil backwaters, lush tea gardens, and golden beaches of Kerala on this 11-day journey. From the historic charm of Cochin to the serene houseboat stays in Alleppey and the coastal beauty of Kovalam, this tour offers a perfect blend of culture, nature, and relaxation.

days.title: Arrival in Cochin – Heritage walk
days.description: Arrive in Cochin and transfer to your hotel. Enjoy a leisurely heritage walk through Fort Kochi, exploring colonial architecture, Chinese fishing nets, and the historic Jewish Synagogue.

days.title: Cochin – Cultural exploration
days.description: Visit the iconic Mattancherry Palace and the Dutch Church. In the evening, attend a Kathakali dance performance to experience Kerala’s classical art forms.

days.title: Cochin to Munnar – Tea estate tour
days.description: Travel to Munnar with scenic stops at Cheeyappara and Valara waterfalls. Explore the sprawling tea gardens of Tata Tea Estate and enjoy the cool mountain air.

days.title: Munnar – Nature trails & wildlife
days.description: Hike through Eravikulam National Park to spot Nilgiri tahrs. Visit the picturesque Top Station for panoramic views of the Western Ghats.

days.title: Munnar to Thekkady – Spice plantation tour
days.description: Drive to Thekkady and tour a spice plantation to learn about cardamom, pepper, and vanilla cultivation. Enjoy a traditional Kerala lunch with local spices.

days.title: Thekkady – Periyar safari & bamboo rafting
days.description: Embark on a boat safari in Periyar Wildlife Sanctuary to spot elephants and tigers. Later, enjoy a thrilling bamboo rafting experience on the Periyar River.

days.title: Thekkady to Kumarakom – Backwaters cruise
days.description: Travel to Kumarakom and cruise along the serene Vembanad Lake. Visit Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary to spot migratory birds like Siberian cranes.

days.title: Kumarakom – Village life & fishing
days.description: Experience traditional Kerala village life with a canoe ride and visit to a local coir-making unit. Try your hand at fishing with local fishermen.

days.title: Kumarakom to Alleppey – Houseboat stay
days.description: Check into a traditional houseboat for an overnight cruise through the backwaters. Enjoy a candlelit dinner on board as the houseboat glides through tranquil waters.

days.title: Alleppey to Kovalam – Beach relaxation
days.description: Travel to Kovalam and unwind on the golden sands of Lighthouse Beach. Visit the historic Vizhinjam Marine Aquarium before checking into your beachfront resort.

days.title: Kovalam – Departure
days.description: Spend the morning at leisure, enjoying the sea breeze or a rejuvenating Ayurvedic massage. Later, transfer to the airport for your onward journey.

INBOUND-12.overview: A 12-day rejuvenating journey through Kerala’s serene backwaters and coastal retreats, blending authentic Ayurvedic therapies with luxurious spa experiences. Explore tranquil houseboat stays, lush paddy fields, and pristine beaches while indulging in holistic wellness treatments rooted in ancient traditions.

days.title: Arrival in Kochi – Welcome to Kerala
days.description: Arrive at Kochi International Airport and transfer to your heritage hotel in Fort Kochi. Enjoy a traditional welcome ceremony with coconut water and a brief orientation before settling in. Spend the evening exploring the colonial-era streets and local markets.

days.title: Kochi – Ayurvedic wellness intro
days.description: Begin your day with a guided Ayurvedic consultation to customize your wellness plan. Participate in a gentle yoga session followed by a full-body Abhyanga massage using warm herbal oils. In the evening, visit the Jewish Synagogue and the iconic Chinese Fishing Nets.

days.title: Kochi to Kumarakom – Backwaters retreat
days.description: Travel to Kumarakom and check into a lakeside resort with Ayurvedic spa facilities. Enjoy a scenic houseboat cruise along Vembanad Lake, observing local fishing techniques and birdlife. Relax with a sunset Ayurvedic foot massage upon return.

days.title: Kumarakom – Ayurvedic therapies
days.description: Start the day with a Panchakarma-inspired cleansing session followed by a Shirodhara treatment to calm the mind. Explore Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary by boat, spotting migratory birds like Siberian cranes. End with a traditional Kerala dinner under the stars.

days.title: Kumarakom to Alleppey – Houseboat stay
days.description: Board a private houseboat for a two-day cruise through Kerala’s famed backwaters. Enjoy Ayurvedic meals prepared onboard while gliding past coconut groves and rural villages. Participate in a guided meditation session on the deck at dusk.

days.title: Alleppey backwaters – Rejuvenation cruise
days.description: Continue your houseboat journey with a focus on detoxification therapies like Udwarthanam (herbal powder massage) and Nasyam (nasal cleansing). Visit a local toddy tapper’s hut to learn about traditional palm sap harvesting. Enjoy a candlelit dinner on the water.

days.title: Alleppey to Kovalam – Coastal journey
days.description: Disembark in Alleppey and transfer to Kovalam, stopping en route at a coconut processing unit to observe oil extraction. Check into a beachfront Ayurvedic resort and unwind with a warm oil body wrap. Stroll along the crescent-shaped beach at sunset.

days.title: Kovalam – Beachside therapies
days.description: Begin with a Vasti treatment (herbal oil enema) for digestive wellness, followed by a relaxing Marma massage. Visit the historic Vizhinjam Marine Aquarium and enjoy fresh seafood at a beachside restaurant. Optional: Try a traditional Kerala martial art performance.

days.title: Kovalam – Ayurvedic deep cleanse
days.description: Undergo a half-day Panchakarma session including Virechana (purgation therapy) supervised by an Ayurvedic physician. Spend the afternoon in silent reflection with guided breathing exercises. Explore the bustling local markets for spices and handicrafts.

days.title: Kovalam – Reflexology & nature walk
days.description: Start with a reflexology session to stimulate energy points, followed by a guided nature walk along the coastal cliffs. Visit the famous lighthouse for panoramic ocean views. Enjoy a sunset Ayurvedic herbal tea session on the beach.

days.title: Kovalam – Final spa indulgence
days.description: Spend the day indulging in signature treatments like Pizhichil (warm oil bath) and Thalapothichil (herbal hair pack). Relax by the infinity pool overlooking the Arabian Sea. In the evening, enjoy a cultural Kathakali dance performance with Ayurvedic-themed storytelling.

days.title: Departure from Kovalam
days.description: After a final Ayurvedic breakfast, transfer to Trivandrum International Airport for your departure. Receive a personalized wellness kit with herbal oils and treatment guides to continue your journey at home.

INBOUND-13.overview: Experience India's royal heritage aboard the luxurious Palace on Wheels. This 8-day journey explores historic palaces, forts, and cultural gems across Rajasthan and Uttar Pradesh.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi – Welcome Dinner
days.description: Arrive in Delhi and transfer to the train station for boarding. Enjoy a welcome dinner featuring traditional Indian cuisine as you meet fellow travelers.

days.title: Jaipur – Royal Heritage Tour
days.description: Explore Jaipur’s iconic landmarks including the Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, and City Palace. Enjoy a cultural performance and local Rajasthani cuisine onboard.

days.title: Chittorgarh – Fort & Temples
days.description: Visit the UNESCO-listed Chittorgarh Fort, home to Vijay Stambh and Kirti Stambh. Discover the tales of Rajput valor and ancient temples.

days.title: Udaipur – Lake Pichola Cruise
days.description: Cruise on Lake Pichola and visit the City Palace and Jagdish Temple. Experience the romantic charm of Udaipur’s white marble palaces.

days.title: Jaisalmer – Golden Fort & Dunes
days.description: Explore the Golden Fort of Jaisalmer and enjoy a camel safari in the Thar Desert. Witness the sunset over the dunes with a traditional Rajasthani folk dance.

days.title: Jodhpur – Blue City & Mehrangarh
days.description: Tour the majestic Mehrangarh Fort and stroll through the blue-painted streets of Jodhpur. Visit Jaswant Thada and enjoy panoramic city views.

days.title: Agra – Taj Mahal & Mughal Splendor
days.description: Visit the iconic Taj Mahal at sunrise and explore Agra Fort. Experience Mughal architecture and local handicrafts in Agra’s bustling markets.

days.title: Delhi – Departure
days.description: Disembark in Delhi and transfer to the airport for your onward journey. Reflect on the royal memories of your Palace on Wheels adventure.

INBOUND-15.overview: Discover the pristine beaches, lush jungles, and vibrant marine life of the Andaman & Nicobar Islands on this 10-day tour. Explore the colonial charm of Port Blair, the turquoise waters of Havelock, and the serene beauty of Neil Island, with a mix of adventure and relaxation.

days.title: Arrival in Port Blair
days.description: Arrive at Veer Savarkar International Airport in Port Blair and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening exploring the local markets and enjoying a traditional Andamanese dinner.

days.title: Port Blair – Cellular Jail & Light Show
days.description: Visit the historic Cellular Jail, a symbol of India's freedom struggle, and attend the evening light and sound show. Explore the nearby Chidiya Tapu for sunset views.

days.title: Port Blair – Ross Island & North Bay
days.description: Take a ferry to Ross Island, once the British administrative headquarters, and explore its ruins. Snorkel at North Bay Beach to witness vibrant coral reefs.

days.title: Port Blair to Havelock – Beach Relaxation
days.description: Travel to Havelock Island by ferry and settle into your beachfront resort. Spend the afternoon relaxing at Radhanagar Beach, one of Asia's best beaches.

days.title: Havelock – Snorkeling & Elephant Beach
days.description: Embark on a snorkeling adventure at Elephant Beach, home to colorful marine life. Enjoy a beachside lunch and unwind under the swaying palms.

days.title: Havelock to Neil Island – Island Hopping
days.description: Take a ferry to Neil Island and explore its laid-back charm. Visit the famous Natural Bridge and relax at Sitapur Beach.

days.title: Neil Island – Snorkeling & Village Tour
days.description: Join a snorkeling trip to the vibrant coral reefs near Neil Island. Explore the local villages and enjoy fresh seafood at a beachside shack.

days.title: Neil Island – Bharatpur & Laxmanpur Beaches
days.description: Visit Bharatpur Beach for its shallow waters and vibrant marine life. Head to Laxmanpur Beach for a scenic sunset and photography.

days.title: Neil Island to Port Blair – Return Journey
days.description: Return to Port Blair by ferry and spend the evening at your hotel. Enjoy a farewell dinner with local delicacies.

days.title: Departure from Port Blair
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to the airport for your departure flight. Bid farewell to the Andaman & Nicobar Islands with cherished memories.

INBOUND-17.overview: Experience the vibrant culture, royal heritage, and golden deserts of Rajasthan on this 8-day tour. Explore majestic palaces, bustling bazaars, and serene lakes while enjoying traditional Rajasthani hospitality.

days.title: Arrival in Jaipur
days.description: Arrive in the Pink City and check into your heritage hotel. Spend the evening strolling through the lively Johari Bazaar and enjoying a welcome dinner with local cuisine.

days.title: Jaipur – Royal Palaces
days.description: Visit the Amber Fort with its stunning elephant ride, explore the City Palace’s intricate architecture, and marvel at the astronomical marvel of Jantar Mantar.

days.title: Jaipur – Hawa Mahal & Crafts
