days.description: Discover the iconic Hawa Mahal and delve into Rajasthan’s artistry at the Anokhi Museum of Hand Printing. Enjoy a cultural evening with folk dance and music.

days.title: Jaipur to Jodhpur – Blue City
days.description: Travel to Jodhpur, the Blue City, and visit the imposing Mehrangarh Fort. Explore the vibrant Sardar Market for spices and textiles before sunset.

days.title: Jodhpur – Heritage & Temples
days.description: Tour Jaswant Thada, a marble cenotaph, and visit the ancient Umaid Bhawan Palace. Relax with a traditional Rajasthani thali lunch and explore the local handicrafts.

days.title: Jodhpur to Jaisalmer – Golden Sands
days.description: Journey to the golden desert city of Jaisalmer. Visit the Jaisalmer Fort and enjoy a camel safari under the sunset at Sam Sand Dunes.

days.title: Jaisalmer – Desert Culture
days.description: Explore the intricately carved havelis of Jaisalmer, visit the Gadisar Lake, and enjoy a cultural program with Rajasthani folk performances.

days.title: Jaisalmer to Udaipur – Lake City
days.description: Travel to Udaipur, the City of Lakes, with a stop at Ranakpur Jain Temples. Arrive in Udaipur and relax by Lake Pichola before departure.

INBOUND-18.overview: Experience the royal heritage of Rajasthan with this 8-day tour covering Jaipur, Jodhpur, Jaisalmer, and Udaipur. Explore majestic palaces, vibrant markets, golden deserts, and serene lakes while immersing in the culture and history of India's princely states.

days.title: Arrival in Jaipur
days.description: Arrive in the Pink City and check into your heritage hotel. Spend the evening exploring the bustling Johari Bazaar for traditional Rajasthani jewelry and textiles.

days.title: Jaipur – Royal Palaces
days.description: Visit the Amber Fort with its intricate architecture and elephant ride option. Explore the City Palace and Hawa Mahal, iconic symbols of Jaipur's regal past.

days.title: Jaipur – Cultural Delights
days.description: Discover the Jantar Mantar observatory and Albert Hall Museum. Enjoy a folk dance performance at Chokhi Dhani village to experience local traditions.

days.title: Travel to Jodhpur
days.description: Take a scenic drive to the Blue City, stopping at Ranakpur Jain Temple en route. Arrive in Jodhpur and explore the vibrant Sardar Market.

days.title: Jodhpur – Mehrangarh Fort
days.description: Tour the imposing Mehrangarh Fort with its museum and panoramic city views. Visit Jaswant Thada, a stunning marble cenotaph, and the Clock Tower area.

days.title: Travel to Jaisalmer
days.description: Journey to the Golden City, stopping at the remote village of Kuldhara. Explore the intricately carved Patwon Ki Haveli upon arrival.

days.title: Jaisalmer – Desert Adventure
days.description: Take a camel safari into the Thar Desert to witness the sunset over golden dunes. Enjoy a traditional Rajasthani dinner under the stars.

days.title: Departure from Udaipur
days.description: Travel to Udaipur for your departure flight. Visit the City Palace and Lake Pichola for a final glimpse of Rajasthan's charm.

INBOUND-19.overview: Experience the breathtaking beauty of Uttarakhand with this 8-day tour covering hill stations, holy cities, and serene lakes. From the colonial charm of Mussoorie to the spiritual aura of Haridwar and Rishikesh, this itinerary offers a perfect blend of adventure, culture, and relaxation.

days.title: Arrival in Mussoorie
days.description: Arrive in Mussoorie, the Queen of Hills, and check into your hotel. Enjoy the cool mountain air and relax while soaking in the panoramic views of the Himalayas. Spend the evening exploring the Mall Road, visiting local cafes, and enjoying the vibrant atmosphere.

days.title: Mussoorie sightseeing
days.description: Visit Kempty Falls, a picturesque waterfall surrounded by lush greenery. Explore Gun Hill, the second-highest point in Mussoorie, accessible by ropeway, offering stunning views of the Doon Valley. In the afternoon, visit the historic Christ Church and stroll through the charming town.

days.title: Drive to Haridwar
days.description: Travel to Haridwar, one of the seven holiest cities in Hinduism. Visit Har Ki Pauri, the sacred ghat on the banks of the Ganges, and witness the evening Ganga Aarti. Explore the bustling markets and enjoy local street food like aloo puri and jalebi.

days.title: Haridwar to Rishikesh
days.description: Drive to Rishikesh, the yoga capital of the world, and visit the iconic Lakshman Jhula and Ram Jhula bridges. Explore the Beatles Ashram, a historic site associated with the famous band. In the evening, attend the Ganga Aarti at Triveni Ghat.

days.title: Rishikesh adventure
days.description: Engage in thrilling adventure activities like white-water rafting on the Ganges or a guided trekking experience. Visit the ancient Neelkanth Mahadev Temple, perched atop a hill with stunning views. Relax in the evening by the riverfront or explore local cafes and shops.

days.title: Drive to Auli
days.description: Travel to Auli, a pristine hill station known for its apple orchards and panoramic Himalayan views. Visit the Auli Artificial Lake and enjoy a cable car ride to get a bird's-eye view of the valley. Spend the evening exploring the serene surroundings and local markets.

days.title: Auli to Nainital
days.description: Drive to Nainital, a charming lakeside town nestled in the Kumaon hills. Visit Naini Lake, take a boat ride, and explore the bustling Mall Road. Visit the Naina Devi Temple, dedicated to the goddess Naina Devi, and enjoy the scenic beauty of the town.

days.title: Departure from Nainital
days.description: Spend the morning exploring the local markets for souvenirs like handmade crafts and woolen items. After breakfast, check out and depart for your onward journey, carrying memories of Uttarakhand's stunning landscapes and spiritual vibrancy.

INBOUND-20.overview: Experience the serene beauty of Uttarakhand with this 10-day tour covering hill stations, spiritual retreats, and adventure spots. From the colonial charm of Mussoorie to the yoga capital Rishikesh, and the snow-capped vistas of Auli, this itinerary blends relaxation, culture, and nature.

days.title: Arrival in Dehradun – Welcome to Uttarakhand
days.description: Arrive at Dehradun Airport or Railway Station and transfer to Mussoorie. Check into your hotel and relax while enjoying the cool mountain air. Spend the evening exploring local markets and savoring Garhwali cuisine.

days.title: Mussoorie – Queen of Hills Exploration
days.description: Visit Kempty Falls and Gun Hill via ropeway for panoramic views. Explore Mall Road for shopping and local snacks. In the evening, enjoy a bonfire and cultural performance at your hotel.

days.title: Mussoorie to Rishikesh – Spiritual Getaway
days.description: Drive to Rishikesh via Devprayag, the confluence of the Ganges and Bhagirathi. Visit Triveni Ghat for the Ganga Aarti in the evening. Explore the vibrant markets and try local street food.

days.title: Rishikesh – Yoga and Adventure
days.description: Start the day with a sunrise yoga session at the Ganges. Visit Lakshman Jhula and Ram Jhula bridges, and explore the Beatles Ashram. In the afternoon, try river rafting or visit nearby temples.

days.title: Rishikesh to Auli – Scenic Drive
days.description: Travel to Auli via Joshimath, stopping at Nandadevi National Park for scenic views. Check into your hotel and enjoy the apple orchards. In the evening, take a short cable car ride for sunset views.

days.title: Auli – Skiing and Nature Walks
days.description: Spend the day skiing or enjoying the snow at Auli’s slopes. Visit Auli Lake and take a chairlift ride for breathtaking Himalayan views. In the evening, relax by a bonfire with local hot beverages.

days.title: Auli to Nainital – Lakeside Journey
days.description: Drive to Nainital via Almora, stopping at Ranikhet for its serene landscapes. Check into your hotel and visit Naini Lake for a peaceful evening boat ride. Explore the bustling Mall Road.

days.title: Nainital – Scenic Sightseeing
days.description: Visit Naina Devi Temple and Snow View Point via cable car. Explore the Himalayan Zoological Park and take a stroll around the lake. In the evening, enjoy local Kumaoni dishes at a hilltop restaurant.

days.title: Nainital – Leisure and Exploration
days.description: Take a day trip to Bhimtal or Sattal lakes for a quiet retreat. Visit the Victoria Dam and enjoy nature walks. Spend the evening shopping for souvenirs and local handicrafts.

days.title: Departure from Nainital
days.description: After breakfast, check out and transfer to the airport or railway station. Bid farewell to the scenic hills of Uttarakhand, carrying memories of its beauty and tranquility.

INBOUND-22.overview: Experience the royal heritage and diverse landscapes of Gujarat on this 10-day tour. Explore ancient temples, royal palaces, wildlife sanctuaries, and coastal towns, blending history, culture, and nature.

days.title: Arrival in Ahmedabad
days.description: Arrive in Ahmedabad, Gujarat's largest city, and check into your hotel. Relax and explore the local markets for traditional textiles and handicrafts.

days.title: Ahmedabad – Heritage Walk
days.description: Join the Heritage Walk to explore the old city's pols, mosques, and stepwells. Visit Sidi Saiyyed Mosque and Jama Masjid for architectural marvels.

days.title: Ahmedabad to Bhuj – Rann of Kutch
days.description: Travel to Bhuj, stopping at the White Desert (Rann of Kutch) for its surreal salt flats. Visit the nearby village of Dhordo for cultural insights.

days.title: Bhuj – Aina Mahal & Prag Mahal
days.description: Explore Bhuj's royal palaces, including Aina Mahal with its Venetian chandeliers and Prag Mahal with Indo-European architecture. Visit the Swaminarayan Temple.

days.title: Bhuj to Dwarka – Krishna’s Abode
days.description: Travel to Dwarka, one of Hinduism's four sacred cities. Visit the Dwarkadhish Temple and Bet Dwarka Island for its serene beaches and marine life.

days.title: Dwarka to Somnath – Pilgrimage Trail
days.description: Proceed to Somnath, home to the legendary Somnath Temple. Explore the temple’s history and the nearby Triveni Sangam, where three rivers meet.

days.title: Somnath to Gir National Park
days.description: Head to Gir National Park, the last abode of Asiatic lions. Enjoy a jungle safari to spot lions, leopards, and diverse wildlife.

days.title: Gir to Rajkot – Royal Heritage
days.description: Travel to Rajkot, visiting the Watson Museum and Rashtriya Shala for insights into Saurashtra’s culture. Explore the Jubilee Garden and Lang Library.

days.title: Rajkot to Vadodara – Maharaja’s Palace
days.description: Drive to Vadodara, stopping at the Laxmi Vilas Palace, one of India’s largest private residences. Visit the EME Temple and Sayaji Baug.

days.title: Departure from Vadodara
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Vadodara Airport for departure. Bid farewell to your memorable journey through Gujarat.

INBOUND-25.overview: Experience Karnataka's diverse landscapes and rich heritage on this 8-day journey through royal cities, misty hills, and ancient ruins. From Bengaluru's urban charm to Hampi's UNESCO-listed ruins and Badami's cave temples, this tour blends culture, nature, and adventure.

days.title: Arrival in Bengaluru
days.description: Arrive in Bengaluru and check into your hotel. Spend the evening exploring MG Road or Brigade Road for shopping and local cuisine. Visit the iconic Lalbagh Botanical Garden if time permits.

days.title: Bengaluru to Mysore
days.description: Drive to Mysore (3.5 hours) and visit the magnificent Mysore Palace, illuminated in the evenings. Explore the vibrant Devaraja Market for silk sarees and sandalwood souvenirs before dinner.

days.title: Mysore Exploration
days.description: Visit the Chamundi Hills for panoramic views and the Nandi statue. Explore the Jaganmohan Palace Art Gallery and St. Philomena's Church. Enjoy a traditional Mysore-style dinner.

days.title: Mysore to Coorg
days.description: Travel to Coorg (4 hours) through lush coffee plantations. Visit the Abbi Falls and Raja's Seat viewpoint. Enjoy Kodava cuisine and local honey at a homestay.

days.title: Coorg Nature & Culture
days.description: Explore the misty hills of Coorg with a trek to Tadiandamol Peak or a visit to the Golden Temple. Visit local coffee and spice plantations before a cultural program.

days.title: Coorg to Chikmagalur
days.description: Drive to Chikmagalur (3 hours) via scenic routes. Visit the Hoysala-era Amruteshwara Temple and the serene Baba Budan Giri Hills. Enjoy local Arabica coffee tastings.

days.title: Chikmagalur to Hampi
days.description: Travel to Hampi (5 hours) and explore the ancient ruins of the Vijayanagara Empire. Visit the Virupaksha Temple and the iconic Stone Chariot at sunset.

days.title: Hampi to Bengaluru
days.description: Morning visit to the Hampi Bazaar and Matanga Hill for sunrise views. Drive back to Bengaluru (6 hours) for your departure.

INBOUND-28.overview: Experience the pristine beauty of Lakshadweep with this 7-day island-hopping tour. Explore turquoise lagoons, coral reefs, and serene beaches while enjoying water sports and local culture.

days.title: Arrival in Agatti Island
days.description: Arrive at Agatti Airport and transfer to your resort. Relax on the white sandy beach and enjoy a welcome drink while soaking in the island vibes.

days.title: Agatti – Snorkeling & Beach Walk
days.description: Embark on a snorkeling adventure at the coral reefs near Agatti. Later, take a leisurely beach walk and visit the local fish market to see the day's catch.

days.title: Agatti to Bangaram Island
days.description: Take a speedboat to Bangaram Island, known for its untouched beauty. Spend the day swimming, sunbathing, and exploring the lagoon by kayak.

days.title: Bangaram – Dolphin Sighting & Picnic
days.description: Join a boat tour for dolphin sighting and visit the nearby uninhabited Parali Island for a picnic. Enjoy snorkeling and beach games in the afternoon.

days.title: Bangaram to Kadmat Island
days.description: Travel to Kadmat Island and check into your beachfront resort. Spend the evening strolling along the shore and watching the sunset over the Arabian Sea.

days.title: Kadmat – Glass-Bottom Boat Ride
days.description: Take a glass-bottom boat ride to explore the vibrant coral reefs without getting wet. Later, try kayaking or paddleboarding in the calm waters.

days.title: Departure from Agatti
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Agatti Airport for your departure. Carry memories of Lakshadweep’s pristine beaches and marine life.

INBOUND-29.overview: A 10-day island-hopping adventure in Lakshadweep, exploring pristine beaches, coral reefs, and vibrant marine life. This tour offers a mix of relaxation, water sports, and cultural experiences across Agatti, Bangaram, Kadmat, and Kavaratti islands.

days.title: Arrival in Agatti – Welcome to Lakshadweep
days.description: Arrive at Agatti Island by flight from Kochi. Check into a beachfront resort and enjoy a welcome drink while soaking in the serene coastal views. Relax and acclimate to the tropical climate before exploring.

days.title: Agatti – Snorkeling & Beach Walk
days.description: Morning snorkeling at the Agatti Lagoon to spot colorful fish and coral formations. Afternoon beach walk along the white sands and visit the local fish market to learn about traditional fishing methods.

days.title: Agatti to Bangaram – Island Paradise
days.description: Take a speedboat to Bangaram Island, known for its untouched beauty. Spend the day relaxing on the beach, swimming in crystal-clear waters, and enjoying a picnic lunch on the sand.

days.title: Bangaram – Water Sports & Sunset
days.description: Engage in kayaking, paddleboarding, or glass-bottom boat rides to explore the marine life. End the day with a breathtaking sunset over the lagoon and a candlelit dinner on the beach.

days.title: Bangaram to Kadmat – Coral Reefs & Relaxation
days.description: Travel to Kadmat Island by boat and check into a beach resort. Spend the afternoon snorkeling at the vibrant coral reefs near the island’s western side.

days.title: Kadmat – Dolphin Watching & Beachcombing
days.description: Morning dolphin-watching tour followed by a visit to the local village to see traditional coir-making. Afternoon beachcombing and swimming in the calm lagoon waters.

days.title: Kadmat – Deep-Sea Fishing Adventure
days.description: Embark on a deep-sea fishing trip to catch tuna, kingfish, or barracuda. Return to the island for a fresh seafood lunch and an evening stroll along the shore.

days.title: Kadmat to Kavaratti – Cultural Exploration
days.description: Travel to Kavaratti and visit the Ujra Mosque and local markets. Enjoy a traditional Lakshadweep dance performance in the evening.

days.title: Kavaratti – Glass-Bottom Boat & Relaxation
days.description: Take a glass-bottom boat ride to observe the underwater world without getting wet. Spend the afternoon at a secluded beach and enjoy the island’s laid-back vibe.

days.title: Departure from Agatti
days.description: Morning free for last-minute beach walks or souvenir shopping. Transfer to Agatti Airport for your onward journey, carrying memories of Lakshadweep’s beauty.

INBOUND-30.overview: This 7-day tour explores the cultural and historical gems of South India, starting in the serene French-colonial town of Pondicherry, followed by the ancient coastal town of Mahabalipuram, and concluding in the bustling metropolis of Chennai. Experience tranquil beaches, UNESCO-listed temples, and vibrant local markets while immersing in the region's rich heritage.

days.title: Arrival in Pondicherry
days.description: Arrive in Pondicherry and check into a heritage hotel in the French Quarter. Spend the evening strolling along the promenade, visiting the iconic Promenade Beach, and enjoying a relaxed dinner at a local café.

days.title: Pondicherry sightseeing
days.description: Explore Pondicherry’s colonial architecture with visits to the Aurobindo Ashram, Sri Aurobindo Temple, and the serene Auroville community. End the day with a visit to the vibrant Paradise Beach for sunset views.

days.title: Pondicherry to Mahabalipuram
days.description: Drive to Mahabalipuram, stopping en route at the Gingee Fort for panoramic views. Upon arrival, visit the Shore Temple and the Five Rathas, marveling at the 7th-century rock-cut architecture.

days.title: Mahabalipuram exploration
days.description: Spend the day exploring Mahabalipuram’s UNESCO-listed monuments, including the Arjuna’s Penance relief and the Krishna’s Butterball. Relax at the golden Mahabalipuram Beach in the evening.

days.title: Mahabalipuram to Chennai
days.description: Travel to Chennai, visiting the DakshinaChitra Heritage Village to experience South Indian rural life. In Chennai, explore the historic Fort St. George and Marina Beach.

days.title: Chennai cultural tour
days.description: Visit the Kapaleeshwarar Temple and the Parthasarathy Temple, showcasing Dravidian temple architecture. Enjoy a traditional South Indian lunch and explore the bustling markets of T Nagar.

days.title: Departure from Chennai
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Chennai International Airport for departure. The tour concludes with fond memories of South India’s rich culture and heritage.

INBOUND-33.overview: Experience the serene blend of French colonial charm and Tamil culture in Pondicherry. This 6-day tour explores pristine beaches, spiritual ashrams, and vibrant local markets along the Coromandel Coast.

days.title: Arrival in Pondicherry
days.description: Arrive in Pondicherry and check into a heritage hotel in the French Quarter. Spend the evening strolling along the promenade and enjoying fresh seafood at a beachside café.

days.title: French Quarter exploration
days.description: Visit iconic landmarks like the Aurobindo Ashram and the sacred Auroville Matrimandir. Explore boutique shops and colonial-era buildings in the charming White Town area.

days.title: Beach hopping and water sports
days.description: Relax at Paradise Beach or Serenity Beach with activities like kayaking and paddleboarding. Enjoy a sunset at the iconic Promenade Beach with views of the Bay of Bengal.

days.title: Chunnambar Boat House trip
days.description: Take a boat to the Chunnambar Boat House and explore the backwaters by rowboat. Visit the colonial-era French Church and enjoy a picnic by the river.

days.title: Local markets and crafts
days.description: Shop for handmade crafts, textiles, and spices at the local markets like M.G. Road and Nehru Street. Participate in a traditional pottery or block-printing workshop.

days.title: Departure from Pondicherry
days.description: Savor a final breakfast of French pastries and South Indian coffee before heading to the airport. Depart with memories of Pondicherry’s unique coastal charm.

INBOUND-35.overview: Experience the vibrant culture, serene beaches, and historic charm of Goa through this 7-day itinerary. From exploring colonial architecture to indulging in water sports and local cuisine, this tour offers a perfect blend of relaxation and adventure.

days.title: Arrival in Goa – Welcome to Paradise
days.description: Arrive in Goa and check into your beachfront resort. Relax on the golden sands of Baga Beach or explore the lively markets of Calangute for a taste of local flavors and souvenirs.

days.title: North Goa Exploration – Beaches & Forts
days.description: Visit the iconic Fort Aguada and Chapora Fort for panoramic views. Spend the afternoon at Anjuna Beach, known for its flea market and vibrant nightlife, followed by a sunset at Vagator Beach.

days.title: Goa’s Spice Plantations – Nature & Flavors
days.description: Tour a lush spice plantation in Savoi to learn about Goa’s agricultural heritage. Enjoy a traditional Goan lunch with coconut-based dishes and explore the nearby Dudhsagar Waterfalls for a refreshing dip.

days.title: South Goa Beaches – Serenity & History
days.description: Discover the tranquil beaches of Palolem and Colva, perfect for swimming and sunbathing. Visit the historic Margao town for colonial-era churches and local markets before a sunset cruise on the Zuari River.

days.title: Goa’s Cultural Heritage – Temples & Churches
days.description: Explore the ancient Shree Shantadurga Temple and the Basilica of Bom Jesus in Old Goa. Attend a traditional Goan folk dance performance in the evening to immerse yourself in local culture.

days.title: Adventure & Water Sports – Thrills & Spills
days.description: Engage in thrilling water sports like jet-skiing, parasailing, or scuba diving at Grand Island. Alternatively, opt for a dolphin-watching cruise or a kayaking adventure in the backwaters of Goa.

days.title: Departure – Fond Farewell
days.description: Savor a leisurely breakfast at your resort before heading to the airport for your departure. Take home memories of Goa’s stunning landscapes, vibrant culture, and warm hospitality.

INBOUND-37.overview: A rejuvenating 10-day tour through Goa, blending serene beaches, vibrant culture, and wellness retreats. Experience tranquil sunsets, Ayurvedic therapies, and local flavors while exploring Goa’s diverse landscapes and heritage.

days.title: Arrival in Goa – Welcome to Paradise
days.description: Arrive at Goa’s international airport or railway station and transfer to your beachfront resort in North Goa. Relax and unwind with a welcome drink and light refreshments as you settle into your accommodation.

days.title: North Goa Beaches – Anjuna & Vagator
days.description: Spend the day exploring the iconic beaches of Anjuna and Vagator. Enjoy water sports like parasailing or jet skiing, and visit the famous Chapora Fort for panoramic views of the Arabian Sea.

days.title: Ayurvedic Wellness Retreat
days.description: Begin a day of holistic healing with an Ayurvedic consultation followed by a full-body massage and herbal steam therapy. Enjoy a nutritious Ayurvedic lunch and unwind in the serene retreat setting.

days.title: Old Goa Exploration – Churches & History
days.description: Visit the UNESCO-listed Basilica of Bom Jesus and Se Cathedral, marveling at Portuguese architecture and the sacred relic of St. Francis Xavier. Explore the Latin Quarter and its colonial charm.

days.title: Spice Plantation Tour – Savoi & Sahakari
days.description: Take a scenic drive through lush spice plantations in Ponda, learning about Goa’s spice trade. Enjoy a traditional Goan lunch and witness the processing of cashews and spices firsthand.

days.title: South Goa Beaches – Palolem & Colva
days.description: Discover the quieter beaches of South Goa, where golden sands meet swaying palms. Relax with a beachside massage or try dolphin-watching in Palolem before enjoying fresh seafood for dinner.

days.title: Yoga & Meditation by the Sea
days.description: Join a sunrise yoga session on a secluded beach, followed by guided meditation to rejuvenate the mind and body. Spend the afternoon exploring local markets for handmade souvenirs.

days.title: Cruise & Sunset Party – Mandovi River
days.description: Embark on a sunset cruise along the Mandovi River, enjoying live music and scenic views. Later, join a lively beach party in Baga or Candolim with dancing and Goan cuisine.

days.title: Cultural Immersion – Fontainhas & Feni Tasting
days.description: Wander through Fontainhas, Goa’s Latin Quarter, with its colorful Portuguese villas and art galleries. End the day with a feni tasting session, sampling this traditional Goan spirit.

days.title: Departure – Fond Farewell
days.description: After breakfast, check out and transfer to the airport or railway station for your onward journey. Take home cherished memories of Goa’s beauty, culture, and tranquility.

INBOUND-38.overview: Experience the breathtaking beauty of Jammu & Kashmir on this 10-day tour, exploring the serene lakes, lush meadows, and snow-capped peaks of Srinagar, Gulmarg, and Pahalgam. From houseboat stays on Dal Lake to thrilling gondola rides in Gulmarg and scenic pony rides in Pahalgam, this itinerary blends adventure, culture, and tranquility.

days.title: Arrival in Srinagar
days.description: Arrive in Srinagar, the summer capital of Jammu & Kashmir, and transfer to a houseboat on Dal Lake. Enjoy a traditional Kashmiri welcome with Kahwa tea and explore the nearby Mughal Gardens like Shalimar Bagh.

days.title: Srinagar sightseeing
days.description: Visit the iconic Dal Lake and Hazratbal Shrine, then explore the historic Jama Masjid and the vibrant local markets. In the evening, enjoy a Shikara ride on the lake as the sun sets.

days.title: Srinagar to Gulmarg
days.description: Drive to Gulmarg, known as the 'Meadow of Flowers,' and take the Gondola ride to reach the summit for panoramic views of the Himalayas. Explore the pristine meadows and enjoy the alpine scenery.

days.title: Gulmarg adventure
days.description: Engage in thrilling activities like skiing, horse riding, or trekking in Gulmarg’s vast meadows. Visit the Mahamaya Temple for a spiritual experience and soak in the serene atmosphere.

days.title: Gulmarg to Pahalgam
days.description: Travel to Pahalgam, a picturesque town nestled along the Lidder River, and check into a cozy hotel. Enjoy a leisurely walk along the riverbank and visit the local market for souvenirs.

days.title: Pahalgam exploration
days.description: Embark on a pony ride to the breathtaking Betaab Valley, named after the Bollywood movie filmed here. Visit the Aru Valley and enjoy a picnic by the river.

days.title: Pahalgam to Srinagar
days.description: Return to Srinagar and spend the evening exploring the local crafts at the Kashmir Government Arts Emporium. Enjoy a traditional Kashmiri dinner with cultural performances.

days.title: Srinagar leisure day
days.description: Visit the pristine Nagin Lake and enjoy a Shikara ride in its calm waters. Explore the local cuisine at a traditional Wazwan feast in the evening.

days.title: Srinagar to Gulmarg
days.description: Revisit Gulmarg for more adventure or relaxation, depending on your preference. Enjoy a final Gondola ride or a peaceful walk in the meadows before returning to Srinagar.

days.title: Departure from Srinagar
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to the airport for your onward journey. Take home memories of Kashmir’s stunning landscapes and warm hospitality.

INBOUND-39.overview: Experience the breathtaking beauty of Jammu & Kashmir with this 7-day tour, starting in Srinagar. Explore pristine lakes, Mughal gardens, and the serene Dal Lake, along with visits to historic temples and scenic valleys.

days.title: Arrival in Srinagar
days.description: Arrive in Srinagar, the summer capital of Jammu & Kashmir. Check into a houseboat on Dal Lake and enjoy a traditional Kashmiri welcome dinner with local delicacies.

days.title: Srinagar sightseeing – Dal Lake cruise
days.description: Begin the day with a shikara ride on Dal Lake, visiting floating gardens and the iconic Mughal-era gardens of Nishat and Shalimar. Later, explore the old city and local markets.

days.title: Srinagar to Gulmarg – Gondola ride
days.description: Travel to Gulmarg, known as the 'Meadow of Flowers,' and enjoy a scenic cable car ride to Kongdori Peak. Spend the afternoon exploring the lush meadows and alpine landscapes.

days.title: Gulmarg to Pahalgam – Adventure day
days.description: Drive to Pahalgam, a picturesque valley along the Lidder River. Engage in activities like horse riding or trekking to Baisaran meadows, surrounded by snow-capped peaks.

days.title: Pahalgam to Sonmarg – Scenic drive
days.description: Journey to Sonmarg, the 'Golden Meadow,' passing through the Sindh Valley. Visit the Thajiwas Glacier and enjoy the stunning Himalayan vistas along the way.

days.title: Sonmarg to Srinagar – Relaxation day
days.description: Return to Srinagar and spend the day at leisure, perhaps visiting the Hazratbal Shrine or relaxing by Dal Lake. Enjoy a cultural performance in the evening.

days.title: Departure from Srinagar
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to the airport for your onward journey. Take home memories of Kashmir’s unparalleled beauty and hospitality.

INBOUND-40.overview: Experience the royal heritage of India aboard the Maharaja's Express with a 7-day journey through iconic destinations. From the Pink City of Jaipur to the spiritual city of Varanasi, this itinerary combines wildlife, history, culture, and luxury.

days.title: Arrival in Jaipur
days.description: Arrive in Jaipur, the capital of Rajasthan. Board the Maharaja's Express and enjoy a welcome drink and briefing. Later, proceed for a city tour including the Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, and City Palace. Enjoy a royal dinner onboard.

days.title: Jaipur to Ranthambore
days.description: Morning safari in Ranthambore National Park, famous for its Bengal tigers. Afternoon at leisure. Evening cultural performance onboard the train.

days.title: Ranthambore to Agra
days.description: Morning visit to Ranthambore Fort. Afternoon transfer to Agra. Evening visit to the Taj Mahal at sunset. Return to the train for dinner.

days.title: Agra to Orchha
days.description: Morning visit to Agra Fort and Fatehpur Sikri. Afternoon transfer to Orchha. Evening sightseeing of Orchha's historic temples and palaces. Overnight onboard.

days.title: Orchha to Varanasi
days.description: Morning visit to Jhansi Fort. Afternoon transfer to Varanasi. Evening Ganga Aarti at Dashashwamedh Ghat. Overnight onboard.

days.title: Varanasi Sightseeing
days.description: Morning boat ride on the Ganges. Visit Sarnath and Kashi Vishwanath Temple. Afternoon at leisure. Evening cultural show onboard.

days.title: Departure from Delhi
days.description: Morning transfer to Delhi. Visit Qutub Minar and Humayun's Tomb. Afternoon at leisure. Evening departure from Delhi.

INBOUND-41.overview: Explore the cultural and historical treasures of South India with visits to royal palaces, ancient temples, and serene backwaters. This 6-day journey highlights the architectural splendor and spiritual heritage of Mysore, Thanjavur, and Cochin, ending with a relaxing stay in Chertala.

days.title: Arrival in Bengaluru
days.description: Arrive in Bengaluru and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening at leisure, exploring the city’s vibrant markets or enjoying local cuisine at a nearby restaurant.

days.title: Mysore – Royal Heritage
days.description: Visit the majestic Mysore Palace and the Chamundi Hills. Explore the Brindavan Gardens in the evening for a stunning light and fountain show.

days.title: Kanchipuram – Silk & Temples
days.description: Discover the ancient Kailasanathar Temple and Ekambareswarar Temple. Witness the art of silk weaving at a local handloom unit.

days.title: Thanjavur – Temple Art
days.description: Tour the UNESCO-listed Brihadeeswarar Temple and the Thanjavur Royal Palace. Experience the rich tradition of Tanjore painting.

days.title: Cochin – Backwaters & Forts
days.description: Cruise through the serene backwaters of Cochin and visit Fort Kochi’s colonial landmarks. Enjoy a Kathakali dance performance in the evening.

days.title: Chertala – Relaxation
days.description: Spend a peaceful morning by the backwaters before transferring to Bengaluru for your departure.

INBOUND-43.overview: Embark on an 8-day journey through India's royal heritage, from the wildlife of Ranthambore to the iconic Taj Mahal, vibrant palaces of Rajasthan, and ancient caves of Maharashtra. This tour blends history, culture, and adventure across six iconic cities.

days.title: Arrival in Sawai Madhopur
days.description: Arrive at Sawai Madhopur, gateway to Ranthambore National Park. Check into a heritage hotel and relax before an evening jungle safari to spot Bengal tigers and other wildlife.

days.title: Sawai Madhopur – Ranthambore Safari
days.description: Enjoy two safaris in Ranthambore National Park, exploring its dense forests and historic ruins. Spot tigers, leopards, and diverse bird species amid scenic landscapes.

days.title: Agra – Taj Mahal & Fort
days.description: Travel to Agra and visit the breathtaking Taj Mahal at sunrise. Explore Agra Fort and the serene Mehtab Bagh for stunning views of the monument.

days.title: Jaipur – Royal Palaces & Markets
days.description: Discover Jaipur’s royal heritage with visits to Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, and City Palace. Stroll through Johari Bazaar for vibrant textiles and jewelry.

days.title: Jaipur – Pink City Exploration
days.description: Explore Jantar Mantar, an astronomical marvel, and the grand Albert Hall Museum. Enjoy a cultural evening with traditional Rajasthani dance and music.

days.title: Udaipur – Lakes & Palaces
days.description: Visit the City Palace and serene Lake Pichola, taking a boat ride to Jag Mandir Island. Explore Jagdish Temple and stroll through the colorful bazaars.

days.title: Aurangabad – Ajanta & Ellora Caves
days.description: Travel to Aurangabad and explore the UNESCO-listed Ajanta and Ellora Caves, showcasing ancient rock-cut temples and Buddhist art.

days.title: Mumbai – Departure
days.description: Transfer to Mumbai for departure. If time permits, visit the Gateway of India or Colaba Causeway for last-minute shopping before heading to the airport.

INBOUND-45.overview: Explore the cultural and natural wonders of Madhya Pradesh on this 8-day tour, featuring heritage sites, hill stations, and wildlife sanctuaries. From the lakes of Bhopal to the serene landscapes of Pachmarhi, and the tiger reserves of Kanha, this itinerary offers a blend of history, nature, and adventure.

days.title: Arrival in Bhopal – Lakes and Heritage
days.description: Arrive in Bhopal, the capital of Madhya Pradesh, known as the 'City of Lakes.' Visit the iconic Upper Lake and Lower Lake, and explore the historic Taj-ul-Masajid, one of India's largest mosques. Enjoy a cultural evening with local cuisine at a traditional restaurant.

days.title: Bhopal to Pachmarhi – Hill Station Arrival
days.description: Travel to Pachmarhi, a scenic hill station nestled in the Satpura Range. Visit the Pandava Caves, believed to be the hiding place of the Pandavas from the Mahabharata. Explore the charming town and enjoy the cool climate and lush greenery.

days.title: Pachmarhi – Waterfalls and Viewpoints
days.description: Discover the natural beauty of Pachmarhi with visits to the stunning Bee Falls and Rajat Prapat (Silver Falls). Hike to the highest point, Dhupgarh, for breathtaking sunrise views. Explore the ancient Jata Shankar Cave and enjoy a peaceful evening in the hills.

days.title: Pachmarhi to Kanha – Wildlife Safari Prep
days.description: Drive to Kanha National Park, one of India's premier tiger reserves. En route, stop at the historic town of Mandla to visit the ancient Ghanteshwar Temple. Arrive at Kanha and prepare for the safari with a briefing on park rules and wildlife spotting tips.

days.title: Kanha – Morning and Evening Safaris
days.description: Embark on thrilling jeep safaris into Kanha National Park to spot Bengal tigers, leopards, and other wildlife. Visit the Kanha Museum to learn about the park's flora and fauna. Enjoy the serene beauty of the meadows and sal forests during the safaris.

days.title: Kanha – Nature Walks and Villages
days.description: Take a guided nature walk through the buffer zone of Kanha to observe smaller wildlife and birdlife. Visit nearby tribal villages to experience local culture and traditions. Relax at the resort and enjoy the natural surroundings.

days.title: Kanha to Jabalpur – Marble Rocks and Temples
days.description: Travel to Jabalpur, stopping at the stunning Dhuandhar Falls and the Bhedaghat Marble Rocks. Visit the ancient Rani Durgavati Museum and the historic Madan Mahal Fort. Enjoy a boat ride on the Narmada River for a scenic view of the marble cliffs.

days.title: Departure from Jabalpur
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Jabalpur Airport or Railway Station for your onward journey. Reflect on the memorable experiences of wildlife, heritage, and nature from this tour of Madhya Pradesh.

INBOUND-47.overview: Experience the rich cultural heritage and royal grandeur of Maharashtra on this 8-day luxury train journey. Explore ancient caves, UNESCO World Heritage sites, and vibrant cities aboard the Deccan Odyssey.

days.title: Arrival in Mumbai – Gateway to India
days.description: Arrive in Mumbai and board the Deccan Odyssey. Enjoy a welcome drink and light refreshments before a guided tour of the iconic Gateway of India and Colaba Causeway.

days.title: Nashik – Wine & Spirituality
days.description: Visit the ancient Kalaram Temple and Sula Vineyards for a wine tasting experience. Explore the serene Godavari Ghat and local markets in Nashik.

days.title: Aurangabad – Cave Temples & History
days.description: Explore the UNESCO-listed Ellora Caves and Aurangabad Caves. Visit the Bibi Ka Maqbara, a miniature Taj Mahal, and the historic Daulatabad Fort.

days.title: Aurangabad – Ajanta & Ellora Exploration
days.description: Spend the day at the Ajanta Caves, known for their intricate Buddhist murals and carvings. Return to the train for a cultural evening with folk performances.

days.title: Kolhapur – Royal Heritage & Temples
days.description: Visit the Mahalaxmi Temple and the historic New Palace. Explore the vibrant bazaars and savor Kolhapur’s famous spicy cuisine.

days.title: Goa – Beaches & Portuguese Charm
days.description: Discover Goa’s colonial architecture in Old Goa and relax at a beachside resort. Enjoy a sunset cruise along the Mandovi River.

days.title: Sindhudurg – Forts & Coastal Views
days.description: Explore the majestic Sindhudurg Fort, built by Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj. Enjoy a scenic boat ride and local seafood delicacies.

days.title: Departure from Mumbai
days.description: Disembark the Deccan Odyssey after breakfast. Transfer to the airport for your onward journey, carrying memories of Maharashtra’s splendor.

INBOUND-48.overview: Discover the cultural and natural wonders of Madhya Pradesh on this 12-day journey through historic cities, wildlife sanctuaries, and ancient temples. Experience the rich heritage of central India with visits to UNESCO sites, scenic hill stations, and royal palaces.

days.title: Arrival in Bhopal
days.description: Arrive in Bhopal, the capital of Madhya Pradesh, and check into your hotel. Spend the evening exploring the Upper Lake, one of the oldest man-made lakes in India, and enjoy a relaxed dinner by the waterfront.

days.title: Bhopal city tour
days.description: Visit the historic Taj-ul-Masajid, one of India's largest mosques, and explore the State Museum to learn about the region's rich history. End the day with a visit to Van Vihar National Park for a glimpse of local wildlife.

days.title: Bhopal to Pachmarhi
days.description: Drive to Pachmarhi, a scenic hill station known as the 'Queen of Satpura.' Explore the lush forests and visit the Pandava Caves, ancient rock shelters with mythological significance.

days.title: Pachmarhi sightseeing
days.description: Hike to the breathtaking viewpoints like the Dhupgarh, the highest point in Madhya Pradesh, and visit the charming Christ Church. Enjoy a nature walk in the Satpura National Park.

days.title: Pachmarhi to Kanha
days.description: Travel to Kanha National Park, one of India's premier tiger reserves. Settle into your jungle lodge and prepare for an evening safari to spot wildlife as the park comes alive at dusk.

days.title: Kanha jungle safari
days.description: Embark on a full-day safari in Kanha, searching for tigers, leopards, and other wildlife. Visit the Kanha Museum to learn about the park's conservation efforts and local flora.

days.title: Kanha to Jabalpur
days.description: Drive to Jabalpur, a historic city on the banks of the Narmada River. Visit the Marble Rocks and Dhuandhar Falls, stunning natural landmarks known for their beauty.

days.title: Jabalpur city tour
days.description: Explore the Rani Durgavati Museum and the ancient Madan Mahal Fort. Take a boat ride on the Narmada River to see the Marble Rocks up close and enjoy the scenic views.

days.title: Jabalpur to Khajuraho
days.description: Travel to Khajuraho, famous for its UNESCO-listed group of medieval temples adorned with intricate carvings. Check into your hotel and relax after the journey.

days.title: Khajuraho temple tour
days.description: Visit the Western Group of Temples, including the iconic Kandariya Mahadev and Lakshmana Temples. In the evening, enjoy a cultural dance performance showcasing traditional Indian art forms.

days.title: Khajuraho to Orchha
days.description: Drive to Orchha, a historic town with grand palaces and temples along the Betwa River. Explore the Orchha Fort Complex and the stunning Jahangir Mahal.

days.title: Departure from Gwalior
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Gwalior Airport or Railway Station for your onward journey. The tour concludes with memories of Madhya Pradesh's diverse landscapes and heritage.

INBOUND-49.overview: Embark on an 8-day journey through India's royal heritage, exploring the vibrant cities of the Deccan region. From the cultural grandeur of Udaipur to the majestic forts of Rajasthan and the iconic Taj Mahal, this tour offers a blend of history, architecture, and local experiences.

days.title: Arrival in Vadodara
days.description: Arrive in Vadodara, a cultural hub known for its royal past and vibrant arts scene. Spend the evening exploring the city's local markets and enjoying traditional Gujarati cuisine.

days.title: Vadodara to Udaipur
days.description: Travel to Udaipur, the 'City of Lakes,' and visit the majestic City Palace and Jag Mandir Island. Enjoy a sunset boat ride on Lake Pichola to soak in the scenic beauty.

days.title: Udaipur Exploration
days.description: Explore Udaipur's historic sites, including the Jagdish Temple and Saheliyon-ki-Bari. Experience local crafts at Shilpgram and savor a traditional Rajasthani dinner.

days.title: Udaipur to Jodhpur
days.description: Drive to Jodhpur, the 'Blue City,' and visit the Mehrangarh Fort with its stunning views. Explore the bustling markets of the old city and try local street food.

days.title: Jodhpur to Jaipur
days.description: Travel to Jaipur, the 'Pink City,' and explore the Amber Fort and Hawa Mahal. Spend the evening shopping for jewelry and textiles in local bazaars.

days.title: Jaipur Exploration
days.description: Visit the City Palace, Jantar Mantar, and Albert Hall Museum. Enjoy a cultural evening with traditional dance and music performances.

days.title: Jaipur to Agra
days.description: Journey to Agra and marvel at the iconic Taj Mahal at sunrise. Visit the Agra Fort and Mehtab Bagh for a stunning view of the Taj.

days.title: Agra to Delhi, Departure
days.description: Travel to Delhi and visit the Qutub Minar and Humayun's Tomb before heading to the airport for departure. Reflect on the journey's highlights over a farewell meal.

INBOUND-50.overview: Experience the enchanting beauty of Himachal Pradesh with this 8-day tour covering Shimla's colonial charm, Manali's scenic wonders, Spiti Valley's rugged landscapes, and the serene Chandratal Lake. This itinerary blends adventure, culture, and breathtaking Himalayan views.

days.title: Arrival in Shimla – Colonial Heritage
days.description: Arrive in Shimla, the capital of Himachal Pradesh, and check into your hotel. Explore the Ridge and Mall Road, soaking in the colonial architecture and panoramic views of the Himalayas.

days.title: Shimla – Kufri Adventure
days.description: Visit Kufri, a popular hill station near Shimla, for horse riding and trekking amidst snow-capped peaks. Enjoy the scenic views from the Himalayan Nature Park and indulge in local Himachali cuisine.

days.title: Shimla to Manali – Scenic Drive
days.description: Embark on a picturesque drive from Shimla to Manali, passing through pine forests and charming towns like Mandi. Stop at the Pandoh Dam and enjoy the stunning views of the Beas River.

days.title: Manali – Solang Valley & Old Manali
days.description: Spend the day in Solang Valley for adventure activities like paragliding and zorbing. In the evening, explore the vibrant streets of Old Manali, known for its cafes and hippie culture.

days.title: Manali to Kaza – Spiti Valley Entry
days.description: Drive to Kaza, the gateway to Spiti Valley, via the scenic Rohtang Pass (if open) or through the Atal Tunnel. Enjoy the rugged beauty of the Himalayas and stop at Key Monastery along the way.

days.title: Kaza – Key Monastery & Local Culture
days.description: Visit Key Monastery, one of the oldest and largest monasteries in Spiti Valley. Explore the nearby villages and learn about the unique Buddhist culture and traditions of the region.

days.title: Kaza to Chandratal – Lake of the Moon
days.description: Drive to Chandratal Lake, a stunning high-altitude lake known for its crescent shape and crystal-clear waters. Camp overnight by the lake and enjoy the serene surroundings under the stars.

days.title: Chandratal to Manali – Departure
days.description: After breakfast, drive back to Manali. Spend the day at leisure for last-minute shopping or relaxation before your departure from Manali.

INBOUND-51.overview: An 8-day wildlife and heritage journey through Maharashtra, exploring ancient caves, tiger reserves, and cultural landmarks. Experience the state's diverse landscapes from bustling Mumbai to serene Ramtek and thrilling Tadoba National Park.

days.title: Arrival in Mumbai – Gateway to India
days.description: Arrive in Mumbai, India's financial hub, and check into your hotel. Explore the iconic Gateway of India and take a ferry to the historic Elephanta Caves, known for its ancient rock-cut temples.

days.title: Mumbai – Colonial Heritage Walk
days.description: Visit the UNESCO-listed Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Terminus and the colonial-era Flora Fountain. Stroll through the bustling Crawford Market and enjoy a traditional seafood lunch at a local café.

days.title: Aurangabad – Ajanta Caves Exploration
days.description: Travel to Aurangabad and explore the UNESCO-listed Ajanta Caves, featuring 2,000-year-old Buddhist murals and carvings. Later, visit the nearby Ellora Caves, showcasing rock-cut temples from the 6th to 11th centuries.

days.title: Ramtek – Wildlife & Temples
days.description: Drive to Ramtek and visit the ancient Ramtek Temple, dedicated to Lord Rama. Explore the serene Pench Tiger Reserve nearby, known for its lush forests and diverse wildlife, including tigers and leopards.

days.title: Tadoba – Jungle Safari Adventure
days.description: Head to Tadoba Andhari Tiger Reserve for a thrilling jeep safari, one of India's best tiger reserves. Spot Bengal tigers, sloth bears, and a variety of bird species in the dense teak forests.

days.title: Jalgaon – Ancient Caves & Forts
days.description: Visit the UNESCO-listed Ajanta Caves again for a deeper exploration, followed by a trip to the historic Daulatabad Fort near Aurangabad. Enjoy local Maharashtrian cuisine for dinner.

days.title: Nashik – Wine & Spirituality
days.description: Explore Nashik’s vineyards with a wine-tasting tour at Sula or York Winery. Visit the ancient Kalaram Temple and the serene Ramkund, a sacred bathing spot on the Godavari River.

days.title: Departure from Mumbai
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Mumbai for your onward journey. Enjoy a final shopping spree at Colaba Causeway or a relaxed stroll along Marine Drive before heading to the airport.

INBOUND-55.overview: Embark on an 8-day Cultural Odyssey through India’s historic heartland, exploring royal heritage, ancient architecture, and spiritual traditions. This journey covers iconic landmarks, UNESCO World Heritage sites, and vibrant cultural experiences across Rajasthan, Uttar Pradesh, and Madhya Pradesh.

days.title: Arrival in Sawai Madhopur
days.description: Arrive at Sawai Madhopur, the gateway to Ranthambore National Park. Spend the evening relaxing and preparing for the adventure ahead with a local dinner featuring Rajasthani cuisine.

days.title: Sawai Madhopur – Ranthambore Safari
days.description: Embark on a morning and evening safari in Ranthambore National Park, home to Bengal tigers and diverse wildlife. Visit the historic Ranthambore Fort, a UNESCO site, perched atop a hill with panoramic views.

days.title: Jaipur – Pink City Exploration
days.description: Explore Jaipur’s iconic landmarks including the Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, and City Palace. Stroll through bustling bazaars to shop for traditional handicrafts and jewelry.

days.title: Jaipur – Cultural Heritage
days.description: Visit Jantar Mantar, an astronomical observatory, and Albert Hall Museum. Enjoy a cultural evening with folk dances and Rajasthani folk music performance.

days.title: Agra – Taj Mahal & Fort
days.description: Marvel at the Taj Mahal at sunrise, followed by a visit to Agra Fort. Explore the intricate marble work and Mughal architecture that define these UNESCO World Heritage sites.

days.title: Gwalior – Fort & Temples
days.description: Discover Gwalior Fort, one of India’s largest forts, and the intricately carved Sas Bahu Temples. Visit the Jai Vilas Palace to see its grand Durbar Hall and chandeliers.

days.title: Khajuraho – Temples of Love
days.description: Explore the UNESCO-listed Khajuraho Group of Monuments, renowned for their intricate carvings depicting life and love. Attend the evening light and sound show to learn about the temples' history.

days.title: Varanasi – Spiritual Ganges
days.description: Witness the sacred rituals along the Ganges River in Varanasi, including the Ganga Aarti at Dashashwamedh Ghat. Visit the Kashi Vishwanath Temple and explore the labyrinthine alleys of the old city.

days.title: Departure from Delhi
days.description: Transfer to Delhi for your onward journey. Depending on flight schedules, enjoy a brief city tour or visit Humayun’s Tomb or Qutub Minar before departing.

INBOUND-56.overview: Embark on a cultural journey through India's royal heritage, exploring majestic forts, palaces, and desert landscapes. This 8-day tour traces the historic Deccan region, blending history, architecture, and local traditions.

days.title: Arrival in Agra – Taj Mahal at dusk
days.description: Arrive in Agra and check into your heritage hotel. Enjoy a mesmerizing sunset view of the iconic Taj Mahal, followed by a light and sound show narrating its history.

days.title: Agra – Mughal wonders and forts
days.description: Visit the Agra Fort and the ethereal Taj Mahal at sunrise. Explore the intricate marble work of Itmad-ud-Daulah’s Tomb before heading to the bustling local markets for souvenirs.

days.title: Sawai Madhopur – Ranthambore safari
days.description: Travel to Sawai Madhopur and embark on a thrilling jeep safari in Ranthambore National Park, home to Bengal tigers and historic ruins. Enjoy a cultural dance performance in the evening.

days.title: Udaipur – City of lakes and palaces
days.description: Explore the grand City Palace, serene Lake Pichola, and the romantic Jag Mandir Island. Witness a traditional Rajasthani puppet show and stroll through the vibrant bazaars.

days.title: Jodhpur – Blue city and Mehrangarh
days.description: Discover the towering Mehrangarh Fort and its museum. Walk through the blue-painted streets of the Old City and visit Jaswant Thada, a stunning marble cenotaph.

days.title: Jaisalmer – Golden desert and forts
days.description: Tour the golden-hued Jaisalmer Fort and the intricately carved Jain temples. Enjoy a camel ride in the Thar Desert at sunset, followed by a traditional Rajasthani dinner under the stars.

days.title: Jaipur – Pink City heritage walk
days.description: Visit the Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, and the astronomical Jantar Mantar. Experience a heritage walk in the old city, exploring bazaars and local crafts before a cultural evening.

days.title: Departure from Delhi
days.description: Transfer to Delhi for your onward journey. Enjoy a farewell breakfast at a heritage café before heading to the airport for departure.

INBOUND-65.overview: Experience the pristine beaches and vibrant marine life of the Andaman & Nicobar Islands on this 7-day tour. Starting from Port Blair, explore the famous Havelock and Neil Islands, known for their stunning coral reefs, clear waters, and lush greenery.

days.title: Arrival in Port Blair
days.description: Arrive at Veer Savarkar International Airport in Port Blair. Check into your hotel and relax after the journey. Explore the nearby local markets for souvenirs and fresh seafood.

days.title: Port Blair – Cellular Jail & Beach
days.description: Visit the historic Cellular Jail, a symbol of India's freedom struggle. Later, relax at Corbyn's Cove Beach, known for its golden sands and clear waters. Enjoy a cultural show in the evening.

days.title: Port Blair to Havelock Island
days.description: Take a ferry to Havelock Island, famous for its Radhanagar Beach. Spend the day swimming, snorkeling, and relaxing on the pristine white sands. Enjoy a beachside lunch with fresh seafood.

days.title: Havelock Island – Snorkeling & Forest
days.description: Embark on a snorkeling adventure at Elephant Beach to witness colorful coral reefs and marine life. Later, explore the lush greenery of Havelock Island with a nature walk or visit the Kalapathar Beach.

days.title: Havelock to Neil Island
days.description: Take a ferry to Neil Island, known for its serene beaches and laid-back vibe. Visit the natural rock formations at Natural Bridge and enjoy the sunset at Sitapur Beach.

days.title: Neil Island – Beach & Snorkeling
days.description: Spend the day exploring the underwater wonders of Neil Island with snorkeling at Lakshmanpur Beach. Visit the charming village of Neil Island and enjoy fresh coconut water from local vendors.

days.title: Departure from Port Blair
days.description: Return to Port Blair for your departure. If time permits, visit the local market for last-minute shopping or relax at the hotel before your flight.

INBOUND-66.overview: Experience the breathtaking landscapes and vibrant culture of Meghalaya, known as the 'Abode of Clouds.' This 7-day tour explores the scenic hills, waterfalls, and tribal heritage of Shillong, Jowai, and Guwahati.

days.title: Arrival in Shillong
days.description: Arrive at Shillong, the capital of Meghalaya, and check into your hotel. Spend the evening exploring local markets like Bara Bazaar for handicrafts and street food.

days.title: Shillong sightseeing
days.description: Visit the serene Ward’s Lake and the historic Shillong Peak for panoramic views. Explore the Don Bosco Museum to learn about the region’s tribal cultures and traditions.

days.title: Shillong to Jowai
days.description: Travel to Jowai, a charming town in the Jaintia Hills. Visit the scenic Thadlaskein Lake and the ancient Syntu Ksiar Park, known for its lush gardens and cultural significance.

days.title: Jowai exploration
days.description: Explore the Nartiang Durga Temple and the sacred Monoliths of Nartiang. Enjoy a traditional Jaintia meal and interact with local artisans in the town’s vibrant markets.

days.title: Jowai to Guwahati
days.description: Drive to Guwahati, stopping at the picturesque Umniuhphew River for a short break. Visit the Kamakhya Temple, a revered Hindu pilgrimage site.

days.title: Guwahati sightseeing
days.description: Explore the Assam State Museum and the scenic Brahmaputra Riverfront. Visit the Umananda Island Temple, accessible by ferry, for a peaceful retreat.

days.title: Departure from Guwahati
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to the airport for your onward journey. Reflect on the stunning landscapes and cultural richness of Meghalaya during your visit.

INBOUND-68.overview: Experience the misty hills and living root bridges of Meghalaya on this 10-day tour. Explore colonial charm in Shillong, adventure in Cherrapunji, and cultural gems in Jowai before returning via Guwahati.

days.title: Arrival in Shillong
days.description: Arrive in Shillong, the capital of Meghalaya, and check into your hotel. Spend the evening exploring local markets like Bara Bazaar for handloom textiles and street food.

days.title: Shillong city tour
days.description: Visit Ward’s Lake, a serene spot surrounded by gardens, and Don Bosco Centre for Indigenous Cultures to learn about tribal heritage. End the day at Elephant Falls for a scenic view.

days.title: Shillong to Cherrapunji
days.description: Drive to Cherrapunji, known for its living root bridges and heavy rainfall. Visit the Nohkalikai Falls, India’s tallest plunge waterfall, and explore the Mawsmai Caves.

days.title: Living root bridges trek
days.description: Embark on a trek to the double-decker living root bridge at Nongriat village, a UNESCO-recognized marvel. Cross suspension bridges and enjoy lush rainforest views along the way.

days.title: Cherrapunji to Mawlyngbna
days.description: Travel to Mawlyngbna, a serene eco-village in the Jaintia Hills. Enjoy nature walks, bamboo rafting on the Umngot River, and stargazing in the clear night sky.

days.title: Mawlyngbna village exploration
days.description: Visit local tribal villages to learn about their traditions and crafts. Hike to nearby viewpoints for panoramic views of the surrounding hills and valleys.

days.title: Mawlyngbna to Jowai
days.description: Drive to Jowai, the cultural heart of the Jaintia tribe. Explore the town’s colonial-era buildings and visit the Thadlaskein Lake, a sacred site with historical significance.

days.title: Jowai cultural immersion
days.description: Attend a traditional Jaintia dance performance and visit local markets to see handwoven textiles. Tour the Jowai Presbyterian Church and nearby viewpoints.

days.title: Jowai to Guwahati
days.description: Travel to Guwahati, Assam’s largest city. Visit the Kamakhya Temple, a major pilgrimage site, and explore the Assam State Museum to learn about the region’s history.

days.title: Departure from Guwahati
days.description: Spend your final morning at the Brahmaputra Riverfront for a peaceful walk. Transfer to the airport for your departure flight.

INBOUND-70.overview: This 12-day tour showcases the stunning landscapes and cultural heritage of Himachal Pradesh, taking you from colonial Shimla to the serene valleys of Manali, the rugged beauty of Spiti Valley, and the tranquil Chandratal Lake. Experience snow-capped peaks, ancient monasteries, and vibrant local traditions in one of India's most picturesque regions.

days.title: Arrival in Shimla
days.description: Arrive in Shimla, the capital of Himachal Pradesh, and check into your hotel. Spend the evening exploring the Ridge and Mall Road, enjoying the colonial architecture and panoramic views of the Himalayas.

days.title: Shimla sightseeing
days.description: Visit the Jakhu Temple, dedicated to Lord Hanuman, and take the ropeway for stunning views. Explore Christ Church and the historic Gaiety Theatre before returning to your hotel.

days.title: Shimla to Manali drive
days.description: Embark on a scenic drive from Shimla to Manali, passing through pine forests and charming hill stations like Narkanda. Stop at Kufri for a short trek or horse ride before reaching Manali.

days.title: Manali local exploration
days.description: Explore the bustling Old Manali market and visit the Hidimba Devi Temple, set amidst cedar forests. In the afternoon, take a short trip to the Solang Valley for adventure activities like paragliding or zorbing.

days.title: Manali to Kaza via Rohtang Pass
days.description: Drive through the breathtaking Rohtang Pass, stopping at scenic viewpoints like Rahala Falls. Arrive in Kaza, the administrative center of Spiti Valley, and explore the local market and nearby monasteries.

days.title: Kaza to Chandratal Lake
days.description: Embark on a thrilling jeep safari to Chandratal Lake, known as the 'Moon Lake' for its crescent shape. Enjoy the serene beauty of the lake and camp overnight under the stars.

days.title: Chandratal to Manali return
days.description: Drive back to Manali, stopping at key attractions like Kunzum Pass and the Chandra River. Relax in Manali and enjoy a cultural evening with local music and dance performances.

days.title: Manali to Shimla drive
days.description: Travel back to Shimla via a scenic route, stopping at places like Rampur Bushahr for lunch. Arrive in Shimla and spend the evening at the Mall Road, soaking in the colonial charm.

days.title: Shimla to Narkanda
days.description: Drive to Narkanda, a picturesque hill station known for its apple orchards and snow-covered landscapes in winter. Visit the Hatu Mata Temple and enjoy the panoramic views of the Himalayas.

days.title: Narkanda sightseeing
days.description: Explore the nearby Tannu Jubbar Lake and enjoy a nature walk through dense pine forests. In the afternoon, visit the ancient Hateshwari Temple and relax at your homestay.

days.title: Narkanda to Shimla
days.description: Return to Shimla and spend the day revisiting favorite spots or shopping for local handicrafts. Enjoy a farewell dinner with traditional Himachali cuisine.

days.title: Departure from Shimla
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to the airport or railway station for your onward journey. Bid farewell to the enchanting landscapes of Himachal Pradesh.

INBOUND-TEST-01.overview: This 15-day tour explores Karnataka's cultural heritage and natural beauty before ending with Goa's serene beaches. Starting in Bangalore, it covers historic Mysore, lush Chikmagalur, Hampi's ruins, Badami's ancient caves, and concludes with Goa's vibrant coastal charm.

days.title: Arrival in Bangalore
days.description: Arrive in Bengaluru, check into your hotel, and relax after the journey. In the evening, explore MG Road for shopping and local cuisine or visit the bustling Brigade Road.

days.title: Bangalore sightseeing
days.description: Visit the iconic Bangalore Palace and the Vidhana Soudha. Spend the afternoon at Lalbagh Botanical Garden, known for its glasshouse and diverse plant species.

days.title: Bangalore to Mysore
days.description: Travel to Mysore (3 hours), stopping at Shivanasamudra Falls. Visit the Mysore Palace in the evening during the illuminated light show.

days.title: Mysore exploration
days.description: Explore the Mysore Zoo and the historic St. Philomena’s Church. Visit Brindavan Gardens in the evening for a musical fountain show.

days.title: Mysore to Chikmagalur
days.description: Drive to Chikmagalur (3.5 hours), passing coffee plantations. Visit the serene Hoysala temples at Amruthapura and Kalaseshwara.

days.title: Chikmagalur nature tour
days.description: Hike to Mullayanagiri peak, the highest in Karnataka. Explore the lush green landscapes of Bhadra Wildlife Sanctuary.

days.title: Chikmagalur to Hospet
days.description: Travel to Hospet (5 hours), stopping at Belur and Halebidu for their stunning Hoysala architecture. Check into a hotel near Hampi.

days.title: Hampi ruins exploration
days.description: Spend the day exploring the UNESCO-listed ruins of Hampi, including Virupaksha Temple and the Stone Chariot. Visit the sunset viewpoint at Matanga Hill.

days.title: Hampi to Badami
days.description: Drive to Badami (3 hours), visiting Aihole’s ancient temples en route. Check into a hotel near Badami caves.

days.title: Badami caves and temples
days.description: Explore the rock-cut Badami Cave Temples and the historic Agastya Lake. Visit the ancient Durga Temple and Pattadakal’s UNESCO sites.

days.title: Badami to Goa
days.description: Travel to Goa (7 hours), stopping at Dandeli for a short nature break. Arrive in North Goa and check into a beachside resort.

days.title: Goa beaches and markets
days.description: Relax at Baga Beach and explore the vibrant Anjuna Flea Market. Enjoy a beachside seafood dinner in the evening.

days.title: Goa cultural tour
days.description: Visit Old Goa’s churches like Basilica of Bom Jesus and Sé Cathedral. Explore Fontainhas, the Latin Quarter, in Panjim.

days.title: Goa water sports
days.description: Engage in water sports like parasailing or jet skiing at Palolem Beach. Spend the evening at a beach shack enjoying Goan feni and seafood.

days.title: Departure from Goa
days.description: Enjoy a leisurely breakfast at the resort before heading to the airport for your departure. Relish the memories of your Karnataka-Goa journey.

INBOUND-TEST-02.overview: Explore India’s iconic Golden Triangle, visiting Delhi’s historic landmarks, Agra’s breathtaking Taj Mahal, and Jaipur’s royal palaces. This 7-day tour blends culture, history, and vibrant city life across three legendary cities.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi – Heritage walk
days.description: Arrive in Delhi and transfer to your hotel. Enjoy a leisurely heritage walk through Chandni Chowk, exploring ancient bazaars and sampling local street food like jalebi and parathas.

days.title: Delhi – Mughal & modern sights
days.description: Visit the Red Fort, Jama Masjid, and Humayun’s Tomb, then explore modern Delhi at India Gate and Lotus Temple. End the day with a cultural show featuring classical dance and music.

days.title: Delhi to Agra – Taj Mahal arrival
days.description: Travel to Agra by private car (3.5 hours). Visit the Agra Fort and Mehtab Bagh for a sunset view of the Taj Mahal. Enjoy a traditional Mughlai dinner at a heritage restaurant.

days.title: Agra – Taj Mahal & more
days.description: Witness the sunrise at the Taj Mahal, then explore the intricate marble work of Itmad-ud-Daulah’s Tomb. Visit Akbar’s Mausoleum and stroll through Kinari Bazaar for souvenirs.

days.title: Agra to Jaipur – Pink City entry
days.description: Drive to Jaipur (5 hours) with a stop at Fatehpur Sikri. Arrive in Jaipur and visit the City Palace and Jantar Mantar, an 18th-century astronomical observatory.

days.title: Jaipur – Royal palaces & markets
days.description: Explore Amber Fort with an elephant ride, then visit Hawa Mahal and Johari Bazaar for gemstones and textiles. Enjoy a Rajasthani folk dance performance in the evening.

days.title: Jaipur – Departure
days.description: After breakfast, visit Albert Hall Museum or relax at your hotel. Transfer to Jaipur Airport for your onward journey, carrying memories of the Golden Triangle.

INBOUND-TEST-03.overview: This 11-day spiritual journey traces the footsteps of Buddha, beginning in Delhi and culminating in Lumbini, his birthplace. The tour explores key pilgrimage sites, ancient monasteries, and sacred rivers, offering deep cultural and religious insights.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi
days.description: Arrive in Delhi and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening at leisure, exploring nearby markets or resting after your journey.

days.title: Delhi – Historical Exploration
days.description: Visit Humayun’s Tomb, Qutub Minar, and Jama Masjid to explore Mughal and Islamic heritage. End the day with a drive past India Gate and Rajpath.

days.title: Delhi to Varanasi – Spiritual Ganges
days.description: Fly to Varanasi and take a boat ride on the Ganges at sunset. Explore the ghats and visit Kashi Vishwanath Temple for a sacred experience.

days.title: Varanasi – Pilgrimage & Culture
days.description: Witness the Ganga Aarti at Dashashwamedh Ghat and visit Sarnath, where Buddha delivered his first sermon. Explore the old city’s narrow alleys and silk weaving centers.

days.title: Varanasi to Bodhgaya – Enlightenment Site
days.description: Fly to Gaya and drive to Bodhgaya, the site of Buddha’s enlightenment under the Bodhi Tree. Visit Mahabodhi Temple and the Great Buddha Statue.

days.title: Bodhgaya – Meditation & Temples
days.description: Explore monasteries from different Buddhist traditions and participate in meditation sessions. Visit the Bodhi Tree and the Archaeological Museum.

days.title: Bodhgaya to Patna – Ancient Relics
days.description: Drive to Patna and visit the Patna Museum, housing artifacts from the Mauryan and Gupta periods. Explore Golghar and the ruins of Pataliputra.

days.title: Patna to Kushinagar – Buddha’s Parinirvana
days.description: Travel to Kushinagar, where Buddha attained Mahaparinirvana. Visit the Mahaparinirvana Temple and the reclining Buddha statue.

days.title: Kushinagar to Lumbini – Birthplace of Buddha
days.description: Cross into Nepal and visit Lumbini, Buddha’s birthplace. Explore the Maya Devi Temple, Ashoka Pillar, and the sacred garden.

days.title: Lumbini to Sravasti – Miracle Stupa
days.description: Drive to Sravasti, where Buddha performed the Twin Miracle. Visit Jetavana Monastery and the Anathapindika Stupa.

days.title: Sravasti to Delhi – Departure
days.description: Fly back to Delhi and prepare for your departure. Enjoy a final shopping or sightseeing stop before heading to the airport.

INBOUND-TEST-32.overview: Explore India's royal heritage through its magnificent forts and palaces, from the Shekhawati havelis to the grand palaces of Rajasthan. This 12-day journey traces the legacy of Rajput rulers, blending history, architecture, and culture across historic forts and heritage hotels.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi – Transfer to Neemrana
days.description: Arrive in Delhi and transfer to Neemrana Fort Palace, a 15th-century hilltop fort converted into a heritage hotel. Enjoy a relaxed evening with panoramic views of the Aravalli hills and a traditional Rajasthani welcome.

days.title: Neemrana – Explore the Fort Palace
days.description: Spend the day exploring Neemrana Fort Palace, including its palaces, waterfalls, and stepwells. Visit the nearby Neemrana Baori and enjoy cultural performances in the evening.

days.title: Neemrana to Mandawa – Heritage Walk
days.description: Drive to Mandawa, the heart of Shekhawati, and explore its ornate havelis like Mandawa Haveli and Murmuria Haveli. Enjoy a heritage walk through the painted streets and step into a bygone era.

days.title: Mandawa – Shekhawati Art Tour
days.description: Visit lesser-known havelis such as Jhunjhunwala Haveli and Gulab Rai Ladia Haveli. Learn about fresco art and traditional Rajasthani architecture from local guides.

days.title: Mandawa to Gajner – Desert Safari
days.description: Travel to Gajner and enjoy a camel safari in the Thar Desert. Visit Gajner Palace, a lakeside retreat of the Bikaner royal family, and explore its hunting lodge history.

days.title: Gajner to Rohet Garh – Village & Palace
days.description: Proceed to Rohet Garh and tour the 16th-century fort-palace. Visit the nearby Pichiyak village to experience rural Rajasthan and interact with local artisans.

days.title: Rohet Garh to Deogarh – Scenic Drive
days.description: Drive through scenic countryside to Deogarh and check into Deogarh Mahal, a restored 17th-century palace. Enjoy a sunset walk around the serene lake and village.

days.title: Deogarh – Palace & Local Crafts
days.description: Explore Deogarh Mahal’s interiors, including the Durbar Hall and royal chambers. Visit local pottery and textile workshops to see traditional craftsmanship.

days.title: Deogarh to Udaipur – City of Lakes
days.description: Travel to Udaipur and visit City Palace, Jagdish Temple, and the serene Lake Pichola. Enjoy a sunset boat ride and dinner at a rooftop restaurant.

days.title: Udaipur – Heritage & Culture
days.description: Explore the lesser-known Jagdish Chowk and Saheliyon-ki-Bari. Visit the Bagore Ki Haveli for a cultural evening with folk dances and puppet shows.

days.title: Udaipur to Bundi – Hidden Gem
days.description: Drive to Bundi and tour the Taragarh Fort and stepwells like Raniji ki Baori. Explore the narrow bazaars and admire the blue-painted houses.

days.title: Bundi to Jaipur – Pink City Arrival
days.description: Travel to Jaipur and visit the Amber Fort and Hawa Mahal. Enjoy a farewell dinner at a heritage property, reflecting on the royal journey through India.

INBOUND-TEST-37.overview: A 12-day cultural journey through Odisha’s sacred temples and tribal heartlands, blending spiritual heritage with indigenous traditions. Explore ancient shrines, tribal villages, and coastal beauty from Bhubaneswar to Visakhapatnam.

days.title: Arrival in Bhubaneswar
days.description: Arrive at Biju Patnaik International Airport and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening at leisure, exploring local markets or relaxing at your accommodation.

days.title: Bhubaneswar temple trail
days.description: Visit the Lingaraj Temple, Mukteswar Temple, and Rajarani Temple, showcasing Odisha’s Kalinga architecture. Explore the ancient caves of Udayagiri and Khandagiri in the evening.

days.title: Puri Jagannath pilgrimage
days.description: Witness the grand Jagannath Temple and participate in the evening aarti. Stroll along Puri Beach and explore the local markets for souvenirs and seafood.

days.title: Puri to Gopalpur coastal drive
days.description: Drive to Gopalpur-on-Sea, stopping at Konark to see the Sun Temple. Relax on the serene beaches of Gopalpur and enjoy fresh seafood by the shore.

days.title: Gopalpur village exploration
days.description: Visit nearby fishing villages and interact with local communities. Enjoy a boat ride or relax on the golden sands before an evening cultural performance.

days.title: Gopalpur to Rayagada journey
days.description: Travel to Rayagada, passing through lush landscapes and tribal regions. Visit the serene Maa Majhi Ghat and local markets to experience tribal crafts.

days.title: Rayagada tribal village visit
days.description: Explore the Dongria Kondh and Kutia Kondh tribal villages to learn about their unique cultures and traditions. Participate in local dances and crafts demonstrations.

days.title: Rayagada to Jeypore drive
days.description: Drive to Jeypore, stopping at waterfalls like Duduma and Hatipathar. Enjoy the scenic beauty of the Eastern Ghats and local tribal settlements.

days.title: Jeypore tribal heritage tour
days.description: Visit the Bonda and Didayi tribal villages to observe their traditional lifestyles. Explore the Jeypore Palace and local markets for tribal artifacts.

days.title: Jeypore to Visakhapatnam
days.description: Travel to Visakhapatnam, stopping at Simhachalam Temple en route. Relax at the beachfront or explore the city’s colonial architecture.

days.title: Visakhapatnam sightseeing
days.description: Visit the Kailasagiri Hill, INS Kursura Submarine Museum, and the serene RK Beach. Enjoy a cultural show or local seafood dinner by the harbor.

days.title: Departure from Visakhapatnam
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to the airport for your onward journey. Bid farewell to Odisha’s rich cultural tapestry.

FIT-INBOUND-18.overview: A spiritual journey to the Kumbh Mela Special 2027 in Nashik, featuring sacred rituals, cultural experiences, and divine gatherings.

days.title: Arrival in Nashik & Evening Aarti
days.description: Arrive in Nashik, check-in at the designated accommodation. Attend the evening Ganga Aarti at the Godavari Ghat, followed by a cultural welcome dinner.

days.title: Kumbh Mela Darshan & Sacred Bath
days.description: Participate in the early morning Shahi Snan (Royal Bath) at the Kumbh Mela grounds. Explore the spiritual stalls, attend discourses by saints, and enjoy the vibrant festival atmosphere.

days.title: Spiritual Exploration & Cultural Performances
days.description: Visit the Sita Gufa, Kapila Muni Temple, and other sacred sites in Nashik. In the evening, witness traditional folk performances and devotional music at the Kumbh Mela.

days.title: Departure & Final Blessings
days.description: Morning visit to Trimbakeshwar Jyotirlinga for final prayers. Post-lunch, proceed to the airport/railway station for departure.
